definition.en: It is not that physical reality is false. It is that the physical picture is simply one of an infinite number of ways of perceiving the various guises through which consciousness expresses itself.
definition.zh: 并非物理实相是虚假的。而是说，物理画面只是意识表达自身的无数种感知方式之一。

definition.en: Your physical reality is but one materialization of that inner organization.
definition.zh: 你们的物理实相不过是那种内在组织的一种物质化。

definition.en: The entire package of physical reality is dependent upon the senses' data being timed -- synchronized -- giving the body an opportunity for precise action.
definition.zh: 物理实相的整个包裹依赖于感官数据被定时——同步化——给身体提供精确行动的机会。

definition.en: The organization of your feelings, beliefs, and intents directs the focus about which your physical reality is built.
definition.zh: 你们的情感、信念和意图的组织，引导着焦点，而物理实相正是围绕这焦点建立的。

definition.en: Physical reality is an offshoot or by-product of the highly conscious creative inner self.
definition.zh: 物理实相是高度有意识的创造性内在自我的一个分支或副产品。

explanation:
物理实相并非如表面所见那般坚固、预定或确定。它只是意识聚焦在特定频率范围内才能感知到的一种物质化呈现。你的意识在睡眠中会流动于不同强度之间，从可塑的“前物质”阶段塑造出最终的物质形态。同样，事件也只有一部分会被结晶为物理形式。

你内心深处拥有自己独特意图和目的的蓝图，你是自己物理实相的建筑师。你的信念、情感和意图组织起聚焦点，物理实相便围绕此构建。如果你相信世界的罪恶，便会从感官数据中筛选出证实这一信念的事实，甚至吸引相应事件。

物理实相只是无限感知方式中的一种。身体感官迫使你将经验转化为物理感知，而内感官则允许你以更自由的方式诠释经验，创造新形式。物理实相并非虚假，

quotes.text: The root assumptions that govern physical reality are indeed valid, but within physical reality alone. They do not apply elsewhere. There is a natural tendency to continue judging inner experience against these root assumptions however. The tendency, with further experience, will fade. This interpretation of inner reality into physical terms is at first automatic, and far beneath conscious levels. Inner experience, you see, must to some extent be colored by the physical system while you exist within it.
quotes.translation: 支配物质实相的基本假设确实有效，但仅限于物质实相之内。它们不适用于其他领域。然而，人们自然倾向于继续用这些基本假设来评判内在经验。随着经验的增长，这种倾向会逐渐消退。将内在经验转化为物质术语的过程最初是自动的，且远在意识层面之下。你看，当你存在于物质系统之中时，内在经验必然会在某种程度上被该系统所着色。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The physical reality into which you are born is not nearly as solid or predetermined or definite as it appears to be. Instead there is a field of rich interaction. Your consciousness must be focused at one particular range of frequencies before it can even perceive matter, much less solidity. In sleep your consciousness fluctuates between ranges of intensities, literally flowing into and out of the physical-matter grouping, and forming from more plastic "pre-matter" (with a hyphen) stages, the final shape that matter will take in your world. The same applies to events, where some will be crystallized in physical terms and others will not. The deep portions of your own being are aware of those purposes and intents that are uniquely yours. Unconsciously, then, you have within you what you might think of as a set of blueprints for the particular kind of physical reality you want to materialize. You are the architect.
quotes.translation: 你所出生的物质实相，远不如它表面上看起来那样坚固、预先注定或确定。相反，它是一个充满丰富互动的场域。你的意识必须聚焦于某个特定的频率范围，才能感知到物质，更不用说坚固性了。在睡眠中，你的意识在强度范围之间波动，实际上是在流入和流出物质-粒子群，并从更具可塑性的"前物质"阶段，形成物质将在你世界中呈现的最终形态。这同样适用于事件，有些事件会以物质形式结晶，有些则不会。你自身存在的深层部分，知晓那些为你所独有的目的和意图。因此，在潜意识中，你内在拥有你所能想到的一套蓝图，用于你想要具体化的那种特定物质实相。你就是建筑师。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You know where physical reality is, then, on the dial of your multidimensional television set. While focused within that living scene you can learn to travel through it, leaving the "surface" picture intact and whole. In a way you program yourself, going about your daily duties as conscientiously and effectively as usual -- but at the same time you discover an additional portion of your own reality. This does not diminish the physical self. Instead, in fact, it enriches it. You discover that the psyche has many aspects. While fully enjoying the physical aspect you find that there is some part of you left over, so to speak; and that part can travel into other realities. It can also then return, bringing the physically oriented self "snapshots" of its journeys. These snapshots are usually interpreted in terms of your home program. Otherwise, they might make no sense to the physical self.
quotes.translation: 那么，在你的多维电视机刻度盘上，你知道物质实相位于何处。当聚焦于那个活生生的场景时，你可以学会穿越它，同时保持"表面"画面完整无损。在某种程度上，你对自己进行编程，像往常一样认真而有效地履行日常职责——但与此同时，你发现了自身实相的额外部分。这并不会削弱物质自我。事实上，它反而丰富了物质自我。你发现心灵有许多面向。在充分享受物质面向的同时，你会发现，可以说，你还有一部分自我是剩余的；而那部分可以旅行到其他实相。然后它也可以返回，为面向物质的自我带来其旅程的"快照"。这些快照通常根据你的家庭程序来解读。否则，它们对物质自我来说可能毫无意义。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

But there was even more creative expression to come through Jane this evening, not only in the session itself of course, but after it, as I try to explain in the concluding notes.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Mountains rose and tumbled. Oceans filled. Tidal waves thundered. Islands appeared. The seasons themselves were not stable. In your terms the magnetic fields themselves fluctuated--but all of the species were there at the beginning, though in the same fashion, for as the dream world broke through into physical reality there was all of the tumultuous excitement and confusion with which a mass creative event is achieved. There was much greater plasticity, motion, variety, give-and-take, as consciousness experimented with its own forms. The species and environment together formed themselves in concert, in glorious combination, so that each fulfilled the requirements of its own existence while adding to the fulfillment of all other portions of physical reality (all very intently, and with many gestures).
quotes.translation: 山脉隆起又崩塌。海洋充盈。海啸轰鸣。岛屿出现。季节本身也不稳定。用你们的话说，磁场本身也在波动——但所有物种从一开始就存在，尽管方式相同，因为当梦境世界突破进入物质实相时，伴随着实现一个集体创造事件所特有的所有喧嚣的兴奋和混乱。存在着更大的可塑性、运动、多样性、给予与索取，因为意识在实验自己的形式。物种和环境共同形成自身，以辉煌的组合协调一致，使得每一个都满足自身存在的需求，同时增加对物质实相所有其他部分的满足（都非常专注，并伴随着许多姿态）。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now in your dream, you were quite clearly seeing the threshold between physical reality and the magical dimension in which that physical reality has its source. You were being shown -- or showing yourself -- the difference in the rules or assumptions between the two. The dog's desire for food led him to walk magically through the door, for the desires of the natural creature are satisfied (pause) with an ease that has nothing to do with your ideas of work. What I am getting at is the introduction of the concepts of a different kind of work -- very valuable, vital work that is performed at another level and in a different fashion.
quotes.translation: 现在，在你的梦中，你清晰地看到了物质实相与那个物质实相源于其中的魔法维度之间的门槛。你被展示——或展示给你自己——两者之间规则或假设的差异。狗对食物的渴望，使它神奇地穿过门，因为自然生物的欲望，其满足的轻松程度与你对工作的观念无关。我真正要表达的是引入一种不同工作的概念——非常有价值、至关重要的、在另一个层面以不同方式执行的工作。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth speaks in Session 826, held for Mass Events on March 8, 1978:

quotes.text: Consider this analogy: The self as a moving circle, such as a Ferris wheel. A tree in front of the wheel will represent physical reality. The whole self, or the whole wheel, is composed of many selves in various positions, as the many people who sit on the Ferris wheel. As the wheel turns you call the person or the self who faces the tree the ego, simply because this is the portion that faces physical reality, represented by our tree. But the self who faces the tree one moment is not the self that faces it the next moment, and the operator of the wheel is never in evidence, you see.
quotes.translation: 考虑这个类比：自我就像一个移动的圆圈，比如摩天轮。轮子前面的一棵树代表物质实相。整个自我，或整个轮子，由处于不同位置的许多自我组成，就像坐在摩天轮上的许多人。当轮子转动时，你称面向树的那个人或自我为"自我"，仅仅因为这是面向物质实相（由我们的树代表）的部分。但此刻面向树的那个自我，并不是下一刻面向它的那个自我，而轮子的操作者从未显现，你看。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: You cooperate together to form the physical reality that you know, telepathically, through ways and means that are unknown to you. You weave webs of psychic reality that then coalesce into physical reality. You do not necessarily weave them alone, but together. Your thoughts intertwine with those of others. You are responsible for your own thoughts. You need to learn the power of thought and emotion, but this should fill you with the joy of creativity. Once you realize that your thoughts form reality, then you are no longer a slave to events. You simply have to learn the methods.
quotes.translation: 你们共同合作，通过自己未知的方式与途径，以心电感应形成所知的物质实相。你们编织出心灵实相之网，随后凝聚为物质实相。你们未必独自编织，而是共同完成。你们的思想与他人思想交织缠绕。你们为自己的思想负责。你们需要学习思想与情感的力量，但这应让创造力之喜悦充盈心间。一旦领悟思想塑造实相，便不再受制于事件。你们只需学会方法。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: We will take your physical system as an example. There is general and mass focus of all self structures within that system, binding enough and cohesive enough so that the appearance of a permanent and all-pervading physical reality is maintained. The ego part of the structure concentrates with great intensity, directing itself within those coordinates that form physical reality.
quotes.translation: 我们将以你们的物质系统为例。该系统内所有自体结构存在普遍而集中的焦点，其凝聚力与内聚力足以维持一个看似永恒且无所不在的物质实相。结构中的自我部分以高度专注力运作，在构成物质实相的坐标体系内定向行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The body obviously must react in your official present; hence the brain neatly keeps its physical time sequences with spaced neural responses. The entire package of physical reality is dependent upon the senses' data being timed -- synchronized -- giving the body an opportunity for precise action. In dreams the senses are not so restrained. Events from past, present, and future can be safely experienced, as can events that would be termed probable from your usual viewpoint, since the body, again, is not required to act upon them.
quotes.translation: 身体显然必须在你们的官方当下做出反应；因此大脑通过间隔的神经反应，精准维持其物质时间序列。整个物质实相包覆体依赖于感官数据的定时同步，使身体得以精确行动。梦境中感官不受此限制。过去、现在与未来的事件可安全体验，从你们惯常视角看来属于可能性的事件亦然——因为身体无需对其采取行动。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Later, Jane suggested that I ask Seth to comment upon the ideas in a session. There would also be a number of other reasons for double dreams, of course. I briefly wrote about them in Volume I of "Unknown" Reality; see the notes for Session 692.)

quotes.text: With splendid innocence and exuberant pride, you imagine that the evolutionary system as you know it is the only one, that physically there can be no more. Now within the physical reality that you know, there are hints and clues as to the nature of other physical realities. There are, latent, within your own physical forms other senses, unused, that could have come to the front but in your probability did not. Now I have been speaking of earthly developments, realities therefore clustered about earthly aspects as you know them.
quotes.translation: 你们以绝妙的天真与蓬勃的自傲，想象所知的演化系统是唯一存在，物质层面不可能再有其他。然而在你们熟知的物质实相中，暗藏着其他物质实相本质的线索与提示。你们物质形态中潜藏着未被使用的其他感官，它们本可显现却未在你们的概率中显现。我此刻谈论的是地球层面的发展，因此这些实相皆围绕你们所知的地球面向聚集。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is not that physical reality is false. It is that the physical picture is simply one of an infinite number of ways of perceiving the various guises through which consciousness expresses itself. The physical senses force you to translate experience into physical perceptions. The inner senses open your range of perception, allow you to interpret experience in a far freer manner and to create new forms and new channels through which you, or any consciousness, can know itself.
quotes.translation: 并非物质实相虚假。而是物质画面仅是意识表达自身的无限感知方式之一。物质感官迫使你们将经验转化为物质感知。内在感官则拓展感知范围，允许你们以更自由的方式诠释经验，创造新的形式与渠道，使你们或任何意识得以认识自身。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The organization of your feelings, beliefs, and intents directs the focus about which your physical reality is built. This follows with impeccable spontaneity and order. If you believe in the sinfulness of the world, for instance, then you will search out from normal sense data those facts that confirm your belief. But beyond that, at other levels you also organize your mental world in such a way that you attract to yourself events that -- again -- will confirm your beliefs.
quotes.translation: 你们感受、信念与意图的组织方式，引导着构筑物质实相的焦点。这以无懈可击的自发性与秩序运作。例如，若你相信世界充满罪孽，便会从正常感官数据中搜寻证实此信念的事实。不仅如此，在其他层面，你还会组织精神世界，吸引那些——再次——证实你信念的事件。

quotes.text: There are more than your thought forms in other words. Your thought forms however can be used as definite aids when you are in the proper mental condition, and they can impede your progress if you are not. In physical reality a man in a desperate frame of mind is more apt to emphasize horrible aspects in the news, for example, and to see desperation rather than joy in the faces of those he meets. He will ignore the contented playful child on one side of the street, and notice instead a dirty ragged boy even though he be further away. So your frame of mind when projecting will largely determine the sort of experiences you have, and the environments you visit.
quotes.translation: 换句话说，你的思想形态并非全部。然而，当你处于适当的心智状态时，你的思想形态可以作为明确的助力；若你不在这种状态，它们则会阻碍你的进步。在物质实相中，一个绝望心境的人更容易强调新闻中可怕的一面，例如，在他遇见的人脸上看到绝望而非喜悦。他会忽略街对面那个满足玩耍的孩子，反而注意到一个更远处的肮脏褴褛的男孩。因此，你投射时的心境将在很大程度上决定你所经历的经验类型以及你访问的环境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In other systems this is not necessarily the case. The time system within them is entirely different than your own. In these the inner self is aware of itself as more than one ego. (Pause.) The inner self can play more than one role at once, consciously in other words. Simply as an analogy, it would be as if within physical reality you lived, say, the life of a rich man of great talent, the life of a poor man with entirely different talents, and the life of a mother and career woman. You would be aware of yourself in each of these three roles, and find qualities being developed in each of the separate lives.
quotes.translation: 在其他系统中，情况未必如此。其中的时间系统与你自己的完全不同。在这些系统中，内在自己意识到自己不仅仅是一个自我。（停顿。）换句话说，内在自己可以有意识地同时扮演多个角色。打个比方，就像在物质实相中，你同时过着一位才华横溢的富人的生活、一位拥有完全不同才能的穷人的生活，以及一位母亲兼职业女性的生活。你会意识到自己在每个角色中的存在，并发现每个独立生命中正在发展的特质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: And that self can see through physical reality. And to that self, physical reality is like a breath of smoke in air... and that self does not need the characteristics that you know and find so endearing. And yet it is not an unemotional self; it is a self that has condensed emotions; and, it is not distant.
quotes.translation: 那个自己能够看透物质实相。对那个自己而言，物质实相就像空气中的一缕烟……那个自己不需要你所知且觉得如此可爱的特性。然而，它并非一个无情的自己；它是一个浓缩了情感的自己；而且，它并不遥远。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This electrical pattern the personality, with all the experiences of its earthly time. It then can join or partake of the inner self. In other words, though the ego was adopted originally by the inner self, and was a product of physical heredity and environment, it does not die; but its existence is changed from physical reality into electrical reality. It is still individual. No individuality is lost, but it becomes a part of the inner self, and its experiences are added to the total experience of the many personalities that have composed the inner self.
quotes.translation: 这个电性模式承载着人格及其尘世时间的所有经验。然后它可以加入或参与内在自己。换句话说，尽管自我最初是由内在自己采纳的，并且是物质遗传和环境的产物，但它不会消亡；它的存在从物质实相转变为电性实相。它仍然是个体化的。没有任何个体性会丧失，但它成为内在自己的一部分，其经验被添加到构成内在自己的众多人格的总经验中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now: Dictation. (With many pauses:) When I speak of the dream world, I am not referring to some imaginary realm, but to the kind of world of ideas, of thoughts, of mental actions, out of which all form as you think of it emerges. In actuality this is an inner universe rather than an inner world. Your physical reality is but one materialization of that inner organization. All possible civilizations exist first in that realm of inner mind.
quotes.translation: 现在：口授。（多次停顿：）当我谈到梦境世界时，我指的不是某个想象领域，而是那种观念、思想、心智行动的世界，你所认为的所有形态都从中涌现。实际上，这是一个内在宇宙而非内在世界。你的物质实相只是那种内在组织的一种物质化。所有可能的文明首先存在于那个内在心智的领域。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: An individual inner self, then, through constant massive effort of great creative intensity, cooperates with all other inner selves to form and maintain the physical reality that you know, so that physical reality is an offshoot or by-product of (Pause), the highly conscious creative inner self.
quotes.translation: 因此，一个个体内在自己，通过持续、巨大的、具有强烈创造性的努力，与所有其他内在自己合作，形成并维持你所知的物质实相，因此物质实相是（停顿）高度有意识、创造性的内在自己的一个分支或副产品。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Your own physical environment appears as it does to you because of your own psychological structure. If you gained your sense of personal continuity through associative processes primarily, rather than as a result of the familiarity of self moving through time, then you would experience physical reality in an entirely different fashion. Objects from past and present could be perceived at once, their presence justified through associative connections. Say that your father throughout his lifetime has eight favorite chairs. If your perceptive mechanisms were primarily set up as a result of intuitive association rather than time sequence, then you would perceive all of these chairs at one time; or seeing one, you would be aware of the others. So environment is not a separate thing in itself, but the result of perceptive patterns, and these are determined by psychological structure.
quotes.translation: 你自身的物质环境之所以呈现为现在的模样，是因为你自身的心理结构。如果你主要通过联想过程而非通过自我在时间中移动的熟悉感来获得个人连续性，那么你将以完全不同的方式体验物质实相。过去和现在的物体可以同时被感知，它们的存在通过联想连接而得到证实。假设你父亲一生中有八把最喜欢的椅子。如果你的感知机制主要建立在直觉联想而非时间顺序上，那么你会同时感知所有这些椅子；或者看到其中一把，你就会意识到其他椅子的存在。因此，环境本身并非独立存在的事物，而是感知模式的结果，而这些模式又由心理结构决定。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Within him there are methods of perception that allow him to see through the camouflage settings, to see beyond the stage. He uses these inner senses constantly, though the actor part of himself is so intent upon the play that this escapes him. In a large manner, the physical senses actually form the physical reality they seem to only perceive. They are themselves part of the camouflage, but they are like lenses over your natural inner perceptions that force you to "see" an available field of activity as physical matter; and so they can be relied upon only to tell you what is happening in a superficial manner. You can tell the position of the other actors for example, or time by clock, but these physical senses will not tell you that time is itself a camouflage, or that consciousness forms the other actors, or that realities that you cannot see exist over and beyond the physical matter that is so apparent.
quotes.translation: 在他之内存在着感知方法，使他能够看穿伪装布景，看到舞台之外。他持续使用这些内在感官，尽管他自身演员的部分如此专注于戏剧，以至于这对他而言是隐而不见的。从广义上讲，物质感官实际上形成了它们似乎仅仅感知到的物质实相。它们本身就是伪装的一部分，但它们就像覆盖在你自然内在感知上的透镜，迫使你将一个可用的活动场域"看"成物质；因此，它们只能以肤浅的方式告诉你正在发生什么。例如，你可以知道其他演员的位置或时钟的时间，但这些物质感官不会告诉你时间本身就是一种伪装，也不会告诉你意识形成了其他演员，或者你无法看到的实相存在于如此明显的物质之外。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I am not saying that, nor implying it in the case just mentioned. In your system you have a direct hand in the formation of physical reality. Your natural given data is the result of individual, mass, and collective thoughts, feelings, and emotions, materialized. Your system in this respect is more creative than the systems just mentioned. On the other hand, within these other systems there is a strong innovative group consciousness developing, in which identity is retained but greater inner play allowed between individuals, a large creative interchange of symbol-pools, a drawing upon mental and psychic symbols with greater facility. Because of this, these individuals recognize more clearly the connection between creative images and given sense data. They purposely alter and change their given sense data, and experiment with it.
quotes.translation: 我并非在说，也并非在刚才提到的情况中暗示这一点。在你们的系统中，你们直接参与了物质实相的形成。你们自然给予的数据是个体、群体和集体的思想、感受和情绪物质化的结果。在这方面，你们的系统比刚才提到的系统更具创造性。另一方面，在这些其他系统内，一种强大的创新性群体意识正在发展，其中身份得以保留，但个体之间允许更大的内在互动，符号库之间有更广泛的创造性交流，更自如地运用心智和心灵符号。正因为如此，这些个体更清楚地认识到创造性意象与给定感官数据之间的联系。他们有意改变和调整自己的给定感官数据，并对其进行实验。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The inner self is embarked upon an exciting endeavor, in which it learns how to translate its reality into physical terms. The conscious mind is brilliantly attuned to physical reality, then, and often so dazzled by what it perceives that it is tempted to think physical phenomena is a cause, rather than a result. Deeper portions of the self always serve to remind it that this is not the case. When the conscious mind accepts too many false beliefs, particularly if it sees that inner self as a danger, then it closes out these constant reminders. When this situation arises the conscious mind feels itself assailed by a reality that seems greater than itself, over which it has no control. The deep feeling of security in which it should be anchored is lost.
quotes.translation: 内在自体正投身于一项激动人心的事业，在其中它学习如何将其实相转化为物质术语。因此，有意识心智与物质实相高度协调，常常被它所感知到的事物弄得眼花缭乱，以至于它倾向于认为物质现象是原因而非结果。自体更深层的部分总是提醒它事实并非如此。当有意识心智接受了太多错误信念，特别是当它将内在自体视为危险时，它就会屏蔽这些持续的提醒。当这种情况出现时，有意识心智会感到被一个似乎比自身更强大、自己无法控制的实相所侵袭。它本应扎根于其中的深层安全感便丧失了。

quotes.text: (With many pauses:) Give us a moment ... Such a performance actually means that physical reality clicks off and on.11 In your terms, it exists only in your waking hours. The inner work that makes it possible is largely done in the sleep state. The meeting of body consciousness and your main consciousness requires an intense focus, in which the greatest manipulations are necessary. Perceptions must be precise in physical terms. To some extent, however, that exquisite concentration means that certain limitations occur. Cellular comprehension is not tuned into by the normally conscious self, which is equally unaware of its own free-wheeling nature at "higher" levels. So a disengagement process must happen that allows each to regenerate. The consciousness then leaves the body. The body consciousness stays with it.
quotes.translation: （多次停顿：）给我们一点时间……这样的表现实际上意味着物质实相在开启和关闭。用你们的话说，它只存在于你们的清醒时段。使之成为可能的内在工作主要是在睡眠状态中完成的。身体意识与你主要意识的会合需要强烈的聚焦，其中需要最大的操控。感知必须在物质层面上精确。然而，在某种程度上，这种精妙的专注意味着某些限制的发生。正常的意识自我不会调谐到细胞的理解层面，同样也意识不到自己在"更高"层次上自由奔放的本性。因此，必须发生一个脱离过程，让两者都能再生。然后意识离开身体。身体意识则留在身体中。

quotes.text: You are not alone in physical reality, so obviously your picture of the world is also affected by the world views of others, and you play a part in their experiences. There is a constant waking give-and-take. The same give-and-take occurs in the dream state, however. You affect your world through your dreams, then, as much as you do through your waking activities. In terms of time, lapses had to occur as various species physically matured and developed. They did so in response to inner impetus. The many languages that are now known originated in what you can call, from your point of view, nonwaking reality. Words, again, are related to the neurological structure, and languages follow that pattern. In the dream state many kinds of communication occur, and there are inner translations. Two people with different languages can speak together quite clearly in certain dreams, and understand each other perfectly. They may each translate the communication into their familiar language.
quotes.translation: 你在物质实相中并非孤身一人，因此你对世界的图景显然也受到他人世界观的影响，而你在他们的体验中也扮演着角色。清醒时存在着持续的给予与接受。然而，同样的给予与接受也发生在梦境状态中。因此，你通过梦境影响你的世界，其程度不亚于通过清醒活动的影响。从时间角度来看，随着各种物种在物质上成熟和发展，必须出现时间间隔。它们是对内在动力的回应。从你们的角度来看，现在已知的许多语言起源于你们可以称之为非清醒实相的东西。词语再次与神经结构相关，语言遵循这一模式。在梦境状态中，发生着多种交流，并且存在着内在的翻译。两个使用不同语言的人在特定梦境中可以清晰地交谈，并完全理解对方。他们可能各自将交流翻译成自己熟悉的语言。

quotes.text: Now give us a moment ... As creatures dwelling in time and space, your senses provide you with highly specific data, and with a cohesive-enough physical reality. Each person may react to the seasons in a very personalized manner, and yet you all share those natural events. They provide a framework for experience. It is up to the conscious mind to interpret sense events as clearly and concisely as possible. This allows for the necessary freedom of action for psychological and physical mobility. You are an imaginative species, and so the physical world is colored, charged, by your own imaginative projections, and powered by the great sweep of the emotions. But when you are confused or upset, it is an excellent idea to return your attention to the natural world as it appears at any given moment -- to sense its effect upon you as separate from your own projections.
quotes.translation: 现在请给我们一点时间……作为栖居于时空中的生物，你们的感官提供高度具体的数据，以及足够连贯的物理实相。每个人可能以非常个人化的方式回应季节，但你们所有人都共享这些自然事件。它们为经验提供了框架。有意识心智的职责是尽可能清晰简洁地解读感官事件。这为心理与身体的灵活性保留了必要的行动自由。你们是富有想象力的物种，因此物质世界被你们自己的想象投射所着色、充能，并被情感的宏大浪潮所驱动。但当你们困惑或不安时，将注意力回归到任一时刻的自然世界——感受它独立于你们自身投射之外对你们的影响——是个绝佳的主意。

quotes.text: Now, you see what you are willing to see, and it is stupidity to consider suggestion as the result or the cause of what you see. It is stupidity in class to worry that suggestion would cause a given result... for suggestion causes whatever you see. You form your physical reality through suggestion and expectation. You experience what you expect to experience at a subconscious and a conscious level. And therefore as Ruburt is very careful that suggestion is not involved, so he has also had you be overly cautious, and there have been many opportunities in class that you have missed for this reason... and these are the bets that I have spoken about earlier this evening. You have the ability to see more than you saw, and you have the ability. You enjoyed your passivity (to CW) to the point of a joyous giving-up; and instead, you see, there is a point within passivity where you are passively alert. And you went beyond the point and lost what you might have seen. As our friend here went beyond the point (referring to TM), looked at the portraits and consciously... for you did not make an original intuitive judgment... but consciously looked at those portraits in terms of nationality, age, and all the requirements that you thought of.
quotes.translation: 现在，你们只看见自己愿意看见的东西，认为暗示是所见之物的结果或原因是愚蠢的。在课堂上担心暗示会导致特定结果也是愚蠢的……因为暗示造就了你们所见的一切。你们通过暗示与期待形成自己的物理实相。你们在潜意识与意识层面体验到自己期待体验的事物。因此，正如鲁柏对暗示的介入格外谨慎，他也让你们变得过度小心翼翼，为此你们错过了课堂上许多机会……这些就是我今晚早些时候提到的赌注。你们有能力看见比所见更多的东西，你们确实拥有这种能力。你（对CW）享受被动到近乎愉悦地放弃的程度；然而你看，在被动状态中存在一个节点，在那里你保持着被动的警觉。而你越过了那个节点，失去了本可能看见的东西。就像我们这位朋友（指TM）越过了节点，审视那些肖像时带着意识……因为你没有做出原初的直觉判断……而是有意识地根据国籍、年龄以及你想到的所有要求来审视那些肖像。

quotes.text: It is a portion that has been physical. It is a portion that can understand your (TM) being overwhelmed with work; it is a portion that can understand your being full with child (SW); it is a portion that can understand the times when you wanted to leave physical reality (CW); it is a portion that can understand the part of you (SB) that wanted to be a star; it is a portion that can understand the part of you that wanted to conquer, and is afraid to conquer (WLJ); it is a portion that can understand the guilt you (RC) feel for no reason; it is a portion that can understand the aspirations that you (LD) were unable to fulfill... and if you had fulfilled them, you would not be looking into the subjects that you are looking into now.
quotes.translation: 这是曾经属于物理的部分。这是能理解你（TM）被工作淹没的部分；这是能理解你（SW）身怀六甲的部分；这是能理解你（CW）曾想离开物理实相的时刻的部分；这是能理解你（SB）想成为明星的那部分；这是能理解你（WLJ）想征服却又害怕征服的那部分；这是能理解你（RC）无端感到愧疚的那部分；这是能理解你（LD）未能实现的抱负的部分……而如果你实现了它们，你就不会研究现在正在研究的这些课题了。

quotes.text: They appear to lack the apparent physical durability of, say, a table or a chair, the table and chair being examples of physical realities. And yet their effect is much more durable, and they impress and to some extent manipulate physical realities, in their strong and sometimes explosive emergence into your universe. Such realities do not bow to the artificial time measurements which so often limit you in daily life.
quotes.translation: 它们似乎缺乏例如桌子或椅子那种明显的物理持久性——桌子和椅子是物理实相的例子。然而它们的影响却持久得多，并且它们以强烈且有时爆炸性的方式进入你们的宇宙时，会印刻并在某种程度上操控物理实相。这类实相不会屈从于那些在日常生活中常常限制你们的人为时间度量。

quotes.text: Returning to a previous discussion, I would like to make it plain once more that dream images are not pseudo realities. They exist as fact, though in a different dimension from physical reality. Again, no one would deny the reality of psychological experience when it is felt by the waking personality. Yet such experience also does not have a physical reality, to the same degree that a definite physical object has.
quotes.translation: 回到之前的讨论，我想再次明确：梦境意象并非伪实相。它们作为事实存在，尽管处于与物理实相不同的维度。同样，当清醒人格感受到心理经验时，无人会否认其真实性。然而这类经验也不具备物理实相——至少不像明确物质对象那样具有同等程度的物理实相。

quotes.text: If you are normally capable of dealing with physical reality, you will encounter no difficulties in alterations of consciousness, or leaving your home station. Be reasonable, however: If you have difficulties in New York City, you are most apt to encounter them in a different form no matter where else you might travel. A change of environment might help clear your head by altering your usual orientation, so that you can see yourself more clearly, and benefit. The same applies when you leave your home station. Here the possible benefits are far greater than in usual life and travel, but you are still yourself. It is impossible not to structure reality in some fashion. Reality implies a structuring.
quotes.translation: 如果你们通常有能力处理物理实相，那么在意识转换或离开本位时就不会遇到困难。但要合理：如果你们在纽约市有困难，那么无论旅行到何处，这些困难最可能以不同形式再次出现。环境改变或许能通过调整你们惯常的取向来帮助理清思绪，使你们更清晰地看见自己并受益。离开本位时也是如此。此处可能的益处远大于日常生活与旅行，但你们仍然是你们自己。以某种方式构建实相是不可避免的。实相本身就意味着一种构建。

quotes.text: Now, indeed you are. And... as a piece or chunk of physical matter... You are indeed immediate and here. You do not understand the ways in which you project the physical matter of yourself into this room, however. When you understand that completely and fully, you will no longer be within physical reality. But that is of little notice. You will never notice the difference. In any reality, you create the image that you see. And the reality that follows this one will seem as physical to you as this... and as real. But you will have freedoms within it that you do not have now.... Not unless at 8 o'clock in the morning you leap from the rooftops and fly through the windows to your death.
quotes.translation: 现在，你确实在此。而且...作为一块物质...你确实即时在此。然而，你并不明白自己如何将自身的物质投射进这个房间。当你完全彻底理解这一点时，你便不再处于物质实相之中。但这无关紧要。你永远不会察觉差异。在任何实相中，你都创造所见之像。紧随此实相的下一个实相，对你而言将如这个实相般物质...且真实。但你在其中将拥有此刻没有的自由...除非早上八点你从屋顶跃下，飞窗而亡。

quotes.text: Our ego must have its feet upon the solid earth, it is out of its element, naked and in an unfamiliar environment, outside of the normal characteristics of physical existence. Its basic distrust of dream experience is necessary for the overall balance of the personality. Physical reality is a rock to which the ego must cling, and from which it achieves its power, energy, position, and reason for existence.
quotes.translation: 我们的自我必须脚踏实地，它脱离本原，赤裸裸地处于陌生环境，超出物质存在的正常特性。它对梦境体验的基本不信任，对人格的整体平衡是必要的。物质实相是自我必须紧抓的磐石，从中获取力量、能量、地位及存在理由。

We gave you the patterns intricate, involved, and blessed from which you form the reality of each physical thing you know. The most minute cell within your brain has been made from the patterns of consciousness, which we have given you. We gave you the pattern upon which you formed your entire physical universe... and the comprehension that exists within each cell, the knowledge that each cell has, the desire for organization was given by us. The entire webwork was initiated by us. We taught you to form the reality that you know.
quotes.translation: 我们给了你形成物质自我的模式。我们给了你学会构建物质实相的模式。我们给了你精妙、复杂且蒙福的模式，你由此构建所知每件物质事物的实相。你脑中最微小的细胞，皆由我们给予的意识模式所造。我们给了你构建整个物质宇宙的模式...以及每个细胞内存在的领悟、每个细胞拥有的知识、对组织的渴望，皆由我们赋予。整个网络由我们启动。我们教你构建你所知的实相。

quotes.text: The relatively insignificant example of probable events and their interaction just given (in the last session) provides a few important clues to the nature of probabilities in general. An organization is definitely present, but it is not the kind of order you are used to recognizing. This small private experience is repeated endlessly with different variations in all areas of daily living -- that is, probable events constantly interact, and (intently) through their interaction you end up with one recognized series of episodes that you accept, called physical reality.
quotes.translation: 刚才（上次课）给出的或然事件及其互动的相对微小例子，为理解或然性本质提供了几个重要线索。确实存在某种组织，但并非你习惯认知的那种秩序。这种微小的私人体验，在日常生活的所有领域以不同变体无尽重复——即或然事件不断互动，（专注地）通过它们的互动，你最终得到一串被接受的、称为物质实相的认知事件序列。

quotes.text: Physical reality is therefore glimpsed by other kinds of personalities in other systems, from their own unique viewpoint. Peering at it from this angle, so to speak, you would not recognize it as your own home system. From some of these viewpoints, your physical matter has little or no permanency, while to others your own thoughts have a shape and form, perceived by observers but not by yourselves.
quotes.translation: 因此，其他系统中的其他类型人格，会从各自独特视角瞥见物质实相。若从这个角度窥视，你便认不出自己的家园系统。从某些视角看，你的物质几乎没有或毫无持久性；而对另一些视角而言，你自己的想法具有观察者能感知、而你们自身却无法察觉的形状与形式。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: A large variety of dreams are the memories of this nonphysical existence that constantly occurs, though in waking life you are seldom aware of them. This cycle that psychologists have recently discovered, having to do with the various dream levels, corresponds to the ebb and tide of consciousness as it appears within and disappears from physical reality. It creates physical reality, as you know.
quotes.translation: 各式各样的梦境都是这种持续发生的非物质存在的记忆，尽管在清醒时你很少意识到它们。心理学家最近发现的这个与不同梦境层次相关的周期，对应着意识在物质实相中出现与消失的涨落。正如你所知，它创造了物质实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: He does not realize his condition. When this momentary breakthrough does occur however, then someone with disciplined and developed abilities can explain the situation to him. He can then release himself. In such cases the break with physical reality was somehow incomplete at physical death. The stubborn spirit, usually impelled by still strong unfulfilled wishes, refuses to break contact.
quotes.translation: 他并不了解自己的处境。然而当这种短暂的突破确实发生时，一个具有训练有素且发展完善能力的人就能向他解释情况。他随后就能释放自己。在这种情况下，与物质实相的断裂在物质死亡时不知何故并不完整。那顽固的灵体，通常被依然强烈的未满足愿望所驱使，拒绝中断联系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now some of you who read this book will immediately and intuitively grasp what I am saying, for you will have already suspected that you are viewing experience through highly distorted, though colorful, figurative lenses. Remember also that if physical reality is in a larger sense an illusion, it is an illusion caused by a greater reality. The illusion itself has a purpose and a meaning.
quotes.translation: 现在，阅读本书的你们中有些人会立即直觉地理解我所说的，因为你们早已怀疑自己是通过高度扭曲、尽管色彩斑斓的比喻性镜片来观察经验。也请记住，如果物质实相在更大意义上是一种幻相，那它是由一个更大的实相所引发的幻相。这幻相本身有其目的和意义。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You will in all cases attempt to construct as physical reality your inner conception of what reality is. Your physical environment and conditions are a mirror of your own basic conceptions of reality. If the environment changes it is because your inner conceptions have changed, and no smallest alteration is made within physical reality, that has not first been made within the inner self.
quotes.translation: 在所有情况下，你们都会试图将你们对实相的内在概念构建为物质实相。你们的物质环境和状况是你们对实相基本概念的镜子。如果环境改变了，那是因为你们的内在概念改变了，物质实相中没有任何最微小的改变不是先在内在自我中发生的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Some people encounter war directly, however, in terms of hand-to-hand combat, or bombing. Others are only inconvenienced by it. Here the mass shared environment is encountered as physical reality according to individual belief, love, and intent. In the deepest meaning there is no such thing as a victim, either of war, poverty, or disease. This does not mean that those negative qualities should not be combatted, for in the terms of conventional understanding it certainly appears that men and women are victims in many such cases. Therefore they behave like victims, and their beliefs reinforce such experience.
quotes.translation: 然而有些人会以肉搏战或轰炸的形式直接遭遇战争。另一些人则只感到不便。在这里，共享的集体环境根据个人信念、爱与意图而作为物质实相被体验。在最深层的意义上，不存在战争、贫穷或疾病的受害者。这并不意味着不应对抗那些负面特质，因为按照传统理解，在许多这类情况下，男人和女人确实看起来是受害者。因此他们表现得像受害者，他们的信念强化了这类经验。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The simple fact is that when you dream you are flying, you often are. In the dream state you operate under the same conditions, more or less, that are native to a consciousness not focused in physical reality. Many of your experiences, therefore, are precisely those you may meet after death. You may speak with dead friends or relatives, revisit the past, greet old classmates, walk down streets that existed fifty years earlier in physical time, travel through space without taking any physical time to do so, be met by guides, be instructed, teach others, perform meaningful work, solve problems, hallucinate.
quotes.translation: 简单的事实是，当你梦见自己在飞翔时，你常常确实在飞翔。在梦境状态中，你或多或少在那些对不聚焦于物质实相的意识而言本属自然的条件下运作。因此，你们的许多经验恰恰就是你们死后可能遇到的那些。你们可以与已故的朋友或亲人交谈，重访过去，问候老同学，走在物质时间中五十年前就存在的街道上，不花任何物质时间就穿越空间，被向导迎接，接受指导，教导他人，执行有意义的工作，解决问题，产生幻觉。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Some of the "particles" the theoretical physicists have discovered--and/or created--in their gigantic particle accelerators have unbelievably short life-spans in our terms, vanishing, it seems, almost before they're born. I like to think of such research from the particle's point of view, though, a consideration I haven't seen mentioned in the few scientific journals I read. Keep in mind that according to the Seth material the merest particle is basically conscious in its own way. Mesons are classes of particles produced from the collisions of protons. Did a meson, for example, choose to participate in an atom-smashing experiment in order to merely peek in on our gross physical reality for much less than the billionth of a second it exists with that identity, before it decays into electrons and photons? From its viewpoint, our reality might be as incomprehensible to it as its reality is to us--yet the two inevitably go together.
quotes.translation: 理论物理学家在巨型粒子加速器中发现的（或创造的）某些"粒子"，以我们的时间尺度衡量，其寿命短得令人难以置信，几乎刚诞生便消失无踪。不过我更喜欢从粒子自身的角度来思考这类研究——这点在我翻阅的少数科学期刊中尚未见提及。请记住，根据赛斯资料，最微小的粒子本质上都具有其独特的意识。介子是由质子碰撞产生的粒子类别。举例来说，当一个介子选择参与原子撞击实验，仅仅为了在衰变成电子和光子之前，以该身份存在不足十亿分之一秒的时间，窥探我们粗钝的物质实相时——从它的视角看，我们的实相或许如同它的实相对我们般难以理解，然而这两者必然相互依存。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 1. In Volume 1 of "Unknown" Reality, I wrote in Note 7 for Session 681 that atoms are "processes" rather than things. The classical conception of the typical atom as being composed of a neat nucleus of indivisible protons and neutrons circled by electrons is largely passé, although for convenience's sake we may still describe the atom that way. (In those terms, the one exception is the hydrogen atom, which evidently consists of but one proton and one electron cloud, or "smear.") For the simple purposes of this note, then, I'm leaving out considerations involving quantum mechanics, which concept repudiates the idea of "particles" to begin with. (And surely that notion involves more than a little of the psychic, or "irrational." What a heretical thought from the scientific viewpoint!) But each atom of whatever element is an amazingly complicated, finely balanced assemblage of forces and particles woven together in exquisite detail--one of the more basic examples of the unending and stupendous creativity, order, and design of nature, or consciousness, or All That Is.

quotes.text: Once these physical pathways are opened, the way becomes easier. The pineal, pituitary, and thalamus are important here. The salt mentioned earlier has a connection with the thyroid. The physical brains alone, the unused portions, have it within their ability, for example, to hear color, to smell sound; in other words, these portions contain among other things functions, unused mainly, that would allow you to perceive physical reality in various other fashions. These undifferentiated areas existed first before the specialized senseapparatus was uniformly adopted. As a species you could just as easily have smelled color rather than viewed it, you see. These portions of the brain, once activated, then allow you to switch sense impressions from one sense mechanism to another, you see.
quotes.translation: 一旦这些物理通道被开启，路径便会变得更为顺畅。松果体、脑垂体和丘脑在此处至关重要。先前提及的盐分与甲状腺存在关联。仅就物理大脑而言，那些未使用的区域具备这样的能力——例如，能够"听见"色彩、"嗅到"声音；换言之，这些区域包含诸多功能，其中大部分尚未启用，它们能使你以其他方式感知物质实相。在统一采用专门感官机制之前，这些未分化的区域早已存在。作为物种，你们本可以像"看见"色彩一样轻易地"嗅到"色彩，明白吗？这些大脑区域一旦被激活，便能让你将感官印象从一个感官机制切换至另一个，你明白吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: This in many instances will be distasteful to many, but all physical constructions are transformations of energy made manifest as idea, and then constructed into physical reality. Without the idea you have no physical reality, and without belief that our aims are possible, there will be no achievement. The achievement gained, however, will then provide its own physical proofs.
quotes.translation: 这在许多情况下会令许多人感到不适，但所有物质构造都是能量的转化——能量显化为理念，继而构建成物质实相。没有理念，便没有物质实相；若不坚信我们的目标可能实现，便不会有任何成就。然而，一旦获得成就，它自会提供其自身的物质证明。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: To a large extent the methods of communication may vary. A personality based within physical reality, between lives for example, would find entry in many ways easier. The information he would be able to give, however, would also be limited because of his experience. I do have a memory of physical existence however, and this automatically helps me in translating your mental data into physical form. I do perceive objects, for example. Using Ruburt's mechanism is of great help here also. At times I see the room and the people as he, or rather his perceptive mechanisms, do.
quotes.translation: 沟通方式在很大程度上可能有所差异。例如，一个基于物质实相的人格（如在转世间隙）会发现进入的方式更为容易。然而，他能提供的信息也会因其经验而受限。不过我确实保有物质存在的记忆，这自然有助于我将你的心智数据转化为物质形式。举例而言，我确实能感知物体。借助鲁柏的机制在此处也大有裨益。有时我看到的房间和人群，正如他——更确切地说，是他的感知机制——所看到的那样。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: As I have certainly hinted, the body is a miraculous organism, and you have barely learned the most simple of its structures.1 You do not understand the properties of soul or body, yet the body was given to you so that you could learn from it. The properties of the earth are meant to lead you into the nature of the soul. You create physical reality, yet without knowing how you do so, so that the wondrous structure of the earth itself is meant to lead you to question your own source. Nature as you understand it is meant to be your teacher. You are not its master.
quotes.translation: 正如我无疑已暗示过的，身体是一个奇迹般的有机体，而你们仅掌握了其最浅显的结构。你们既不了解灵魂的属性，也不了解身体的属性，然而身体被赐予你们，正是为了让你们从中学习。大地的属性旨在引导你们领悟灵魂的本质。你们创造物质实相，却不知如何创造，因此大地本身奇妙的构造旨在引导你们质疑自身的源头。你们所理解的自然，本应是你们的老师。你们并非它的主宰。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now the inner ego is the organizer of experience that Jung would call unconscious. The inner ego is another term for what we call the inner self. As the outer ego manipulates within the environment and physical reality, so the inner ego or self organizes and manipulates within an inner reality. The inner ego creates that physical reality with which the outer ego then deals.
quotes.translation: 内在自我是荣格所称"无意识"的经验组织者。内在自我是我们所称"内在自体"的另一个术语。正如外在自我在环境与物质实相中运作，内在自我或内在自体则在内在实相中组织与运作。内在自我创造了那个物质实相，随后外在自我与之打交道。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: However, the personality as it is manifested can never be understood if it is taken alone. There are sufficient hints and signs that do appear, to give evidence of these other portions of the self. Now there is one important point in particular in all this that should be emphasized, and I will repeat it: Certain portions of the self do not manifest themselves directly within physical reality. They do not operate directly within physical reality, and the word directly is significant.
quotes.translation: 然而，若孤立地看待人格的显化，便永远无法理解它。确实存在足够的线索与迹象，能证明自我这些其他部分的存在。这其中有一个特别重要的要点必须强调，我将重复说明：自我的某些部分并不直接在物质实相中显化。它们不直接在物质实相中运作，而"直接"这个词至关重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: You must understand that in any way your situation, and any that you know of physical reality, is highly artificial. It is the mass creation formed by your inner ideas. The time concept is but one example, and it is responsible for many of your most cherished misconceptions. You must form ideas into physical materiaizationl in order to recognize the force behind the ideas you are learning to use and understand. However such materializations are only necessary at certain levels. The time scheme appears valid only within that framework.
quotes.translation: 你必须明白，无论从哪个角度看，你的处境以及你所知的任何物质实相，都是高度人为的。它是你内在意念形成的集体创造。时间概念仅是其中一例，它导致了许多你最珍视的错误观念。你必须将意念形成为物质具象化，才能认识到你正在学习使用和理解的那些意念背后的力量。然而，这种具象化只在某些层面是必要的。时间架构仅在该框架内才显得有效。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The settings in your physical environment, the sometimes lovely paraphernalia, the physical aspects of life as you know it, are all camouflages, and so I call your physical reality a camouflage. Yet these camouflages are composed of the vitality of the universe. The rocks and stones and mountains and earth are living camouflage, interlocking psychic webs formed by minute consciousnesses that you cannot perceive as such. The atoms and molecules within them have their own consciousness, as do the atoms and molecules with your body.
quotes.translation: 你物质环境中的场景，那些有时可爱的陈设，你所知的生活物质面向，全都是伪装，因此我称你们的物质实相为伪装。然而这些伪装由宇宙的生命力构成。岩石、石头、山脉和大地都是活生生的伪装，是由你们无法如此感知的微小意识所编织的连锁心灵网络。它们内部的原子和分子拥有自己的意识，正如你身体内的原子和分子一样。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Until you are honest with yourself and become consciously aware of yourself, you cannot honestly relate with others; you will project upon them your own fears and prejudices. You cannot afford to help them because you have too many insecurities within yourself. Now, you form the physical reality that you know, individually and en masse. To change your world you must change your thoughts. You must become consciously aware of what you tell yourself is true every moment of the day, for that is the reality that you project outward.
quotes.translation: 除非你对自己诚实并能有意识地觉察自己，否则你无法真诚地与他人相处；你会将自己的恐惧和偏见投射到他们身上。你无法帮助他们，因为你内心有太多不安全感。现在，你们个体和集体地形成了你们所知的物质实相。要改变你的世界，你必须改变你的思想。你必须每时每刻有意识地觉察你告诉自己为真的事情，因为那正是你向外投射的实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: When you reach adulthood, following our analogy, then you will learn to be successful in manipulating dream reality as you now manipulate objective reality. For if you create your dreams, you also create your objective environment. The dream reality is as real and actual as physical reality, but it can be changed you see by you, as physical reality can be changed.
quotes.translation: 按照我们的比喻，当你达到成年期时，你将学会像现在操控客观实相一样成功地操控梦境实相。因为如果你创造你的梦境，你也创造你的客观环境。梦境实相与物质实相一样真实和实际，但你看，它可以由你改变，正如物质实相可以被改变一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now, I project a portion of my reality as I dictate this book to an undifferentiated level between systems that is relatively clear of camouflage. It is an inactive area, comparatively speaking. If you were thinking in terms of physical reality, then this area could be likened to one immediately above the atmosphere of your earth. However I am speaking of psychological and psychic atmospheres, and this area is sufficiently distant from Ruburt's physically oriented self so that the communications can be relatively understood.
quotes.translation: 现在，当我口述这本书时，我将我实相的一部分投射到一个系统间未分化的层面，这个层面相对而言没有伪装。这是一个不活跃的区域，相对而言。如果你以物质实相来思考，那么这个区域可以比作地球大气层正上方的区域。然而我指的是心理和心灵的大气层，这个区域距离鲁柏的肉体导向自我足够遥远，因此这些通讯能够相对地被理解。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Nor do such projections involve necessarily journeys through space as you know it. There are systems, extremely vivid in intensity, that have no existence in physical reality. It is now thought, I believe, that time and space are basically one, but they are both a part of something else. They are merely the camouflage patterns by which you perceive reality. Space, as you experience it in the dream state, comes much closer to reality.
quotes.translation: 这类投射也未必涉及你所认知的空间旅行。有些系统虽然极为生动鲜明，却不存在于物质实相中。我相信现在学界认为时空本质上是统一的，但它们都属于某个更根本的存在。它们只是你感知实相时所使用的伪装模式。你在梦境状态中体验到的空间，反而更接近实相的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The root assumptions upon which physical reality is formed represent secure ground to the ego. We always operate with the ego's consent. It consents to step aside momentarily. It interprets the inner knowledge gained in its own way, true, but it is immeasurably enriched by so doing. Other layers of the self interpret the same inner experiences quite differently.
quotes.translation: 物质实相赖以形成的根本假设，对自我而言是安全的基础。我们始终在征得自我同意的前提下运作。它同意暂时退居一旁。诚然，它会以自己的方式诠释内在获得的知识，但通过这样做，它自身也得到了无可估量的丰富。自我的其他层面则会以截然不同的方式诠释同样的内在经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... True order and organization, even of biological structure, can be achieved only by granting a basic unpredictability. I am aware that this sounds startling. Basically, however, the motion of any wave or particle or entity is unpredictable -- freewheeling and undetermined. Your life structure is a result of that unpredictability. Your psychological structure is also. However, because you are presented with a fairly cohesive picture, in which certain laws seem to apply, you think that the laws come first and physical reality follows. Instead, the cohesive picture is the result of the unpredictable nature that is and must be basic to all energy.
quotes.translation: 请稍候片刻……真正的秩序与组织，即便是生物结构的秩序与组织，也只能通过承认基本的不确定性来实现。我知道这听起来令人震惊。但本质上，任何波、粒子或实体的运动都是不可预测的——自由不羁、未受决定的。你们的生命结构正是这种不确定性的产物。你们的心理结构亦然。然而，由于你们眼前呈现的是一幅相当连贯的画面，其中似乎适用某些法则，你们便以为法则在先，物质实相在后。实则相反，那连贯的画面正是那不可预测本质的结果——这种本质是一切能量所固有且必须具有的。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 681
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Many of the most powerful aspects of consciousness are at work precisely when it seems to you that you are relatively unconscious and asleep to physical reality. It would be impossible for you to handle the vast amount of material available, in the context of time as you presently experience it. To operate adequately in your highly specific field (pause), an almost infinite amount of information must be instantly assimilated, probabilities calculated, and certain balances maintained of which you are not even aware.
quotes.translation: 意识最强大的许多面向，恰恰是在你自认为相对无意识、对物质实相沉睡时运作的。若以你当前体验的时间框架，你根本不可能处理如此海量的可用信息。为了在你这个高度特定的领域（停顿）中充分运作，几乎无限的信息必须被瞬间吸收，概率必须被计算，某些你甚至未曾察觉的平衡也必须被维持。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In certain terms, the ego is the eye through which the conscious mind perceives, or the focus through which it views physical reality. But the conscious mind automatically changes its focus throughout life. The ego, while appearing the same to itself, ever changes. It is only when the conscious mind becomes rigid in its direction, or allows the ego to take on some of its own functions, that difficulties arise. Then the ego allows the conscious mind to work in certain directions and blocks its awareness in others.
quotes.translation: 从某种角度说，自我是意识心用以感知的眼睛，或者说它聚焦于物质实相时的焦点。但意识心终其一生都在自动改变其焦点。自我虽然自认为始终如一，却无时无刻不在变化。只有当意识心在其方向上变得僵化，或允许自我接管其部分功能时，困难才会出现。那时，自我便允许意识心在某些方向上运作，同时阻隔了它对其他方向的觉知。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You must still deal with physical reality, for it is definitely the representation of inner data. I have said this constantly: Expectation is behind all Sense data, and forms it. I have told you--and incidentally my lovely skeptics I have told you in the past--that you create your own physical environment and universe. Your physical condition in every way is a reflection of your inner expectations, accomplishments, and failures, and I have told you that any illness is the result of an inner distortion.
quotes.translation: 你仍然必须处理物质实相，因为它无疑是内在资料的表征。我一再说过：期望先于所有感官资料，并塑造了它。我曾告诉你们——顺便说一句，我可爱的怀疑者们，我过去就告诉过你们——你们创造了自己的物质环境和宇宙。你们身体状态的方方面面，都是内在期望、成就与失败的反映。我也告诉过你们，任何疾病都是内在扭曲的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The great communication system within the body itself is dependent, then, upon the constant inner flux and flow of these units. On one level the body's very survival is largely determined by the units' propensities for selectivity and significance. Also, however, the body's physical reality is a seeming constant in a seemingly constant physical existence.
quotes.translation: 身体内部庞大的沟通系统，因此依赖于这些单位的持续内在流动与变化。在某一层面上，身体的存活很大程度上取决于这些单位的选择性与意义倾向。然而，身体的物质实相在看似恒常的物质存在中，也只是一个表面上的恒常。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 684
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: I have also discussed reincarnation in terms of environment because many schools of thought over-emphasize the effects of reincarnational existences, so that often they explain present-life circumstances as a result of rigid and uncompromising patterns determined in a "past" life. You will feel relatively incompetent to handle present physical reality, to alter your environment, to affect and change your world, if you feel that you are at the mercy of conditions over which you have no control.
quotes.translation: 我也曾从环境的角度讨论过转世，因为许多思想学派过分强调转世存在的影响，以至于他们常常将今生的境遇解释为"前世"中既定且僵化不变的模式的结果。如果你觉得自己受制于无法掌控的条件，你就会感到相对无力处理当前的物质实相、改变你的环境、影响并改变你的世界。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You see physical bodies and suppose that any personality must appear in physical terms. None of you are physical; that which is enduring is not physical. In that respect at least you are no different than I. Consciousness is the force behind matter, and it forms many other realities beside the physical one. It is only because your own viewpoint is presently so limited that it seems to you that physical reality is the rule and the mode and the purpose of existence.
quotes.translation: 你看到物质身体，便假设任何人格都必须以物质形式显现。你们中没有一个是物质的；那永恒持久的并非物质。至少在这方面，你与我没有不同。意识是物质背后的力量，它除了物质实相之外，还形成了许多其他实相。仅仅因为你目前的视角如此受限，才让你觉得物质实相是存在的规则、模式与目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Your consciousness fluctuates in the same way. It is here and then it is not here, but the physical self focuses upon only those moments of physical reality. Because consciousness fluctuates however, other portions of your self have memory of those times when it is not focused in "physical reality," and this is also a portion of your entire existence.
quotes.translation: 你的意识以同样的方式波动。它在这里，然后不在这里，但物质自我只聚焦于那些物质实相的时刻。然而，因为意识会波动，你自身的其他部分便记住了那些它不聚焦于"物质实相"的时刻，这也是你整体存在的一部分。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The fact is that each of you create your own physical reality; and en masse, you create both the glories and the terrors that exist within your earthly experience. Until you realize that you are the creators, you will refuse to accept this responsibility. Nor can you blame a devil for the world's misfortunes. You have grown sophisticated enough to realize that the Devil is a projection of your own psyche, but you have not grown wise enough to learn how to use your creativity constructively.
quotes.translation: 事实是，你们每个人都创造了自己的物质实相；而集体地，你们创造了存在于你们尘世经验中的一切荣耀与恐怖。除非你认识到自己是创造者，否则你会拒绝承担这个责任。你也不能将世界的不幸归咎于魔鬼。你已经足够成熟，意识到魔鬼是你自己心灵的投射，但你尚未足够智慧，学会如何建设性地运用你的创造力。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Consider this analogy. For one instant your consciousness is "alive," focused in physical reality. Now for the next instant it is focused somewhere else entirely, in a different system of reality. It is unalive, or "dead" to your way of thinking. The next instant it is "alive" again, focused in your reality, but you are not aware of the intervening instant of unaliveness. Your sense of continuity therefore is built up entirely on every other pulsation of consciousness. Is that clear to you?
quotes.translation: 考虑这个类比。一瞬间，你的意识是"活着的"，聚焦于物质实相。下一瞬间，它完全聚焦于别处，在一个不同的实相系统中。按照你的思维方式，它是无生命的，或"死的"。再下一瞬间，它又"活过来"，聚焦于你的实相，但你没有意识到中间那个无生命的瞬间。因此，你的连续感完全建立在意识的每一次脉动上。这对你来说清楚吗？
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now. As I said earlier, sense data does have a reality, but this reality does not reside in an object. The object represents your interpretation of the basic reality. The energy belongs to the idea. In other words, the prime energy within physical reality resides precisely in those intangibles which do not, because of their nature, appear within physical frameworks. They give life and reality to the physical framework.
quotes.translation: 现在。如我之前所说，感官资料确实具有实相，但这实相并不存在于物体之中。物体代表你对基本实相的解释。能量属于意念。换言之，物质实相中的主要能量恰恰存在于那些因其本质而无法在物质架构中显现的无形之物中。它们赋予物质架构生命与实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: There are obviously as many kinds of ghosts and apparitions as there are people. They are as alert or as unalert to their situation as you are to your own. They are not fully focused in physical reality, however, either in personality or in form, and this is their main distinction. Some apparitions are thought-forms sent by survival personalities out of lingering deep anxiety. They portray the same compulsive-type behavior that can be seen in many instances in your ordinary experience.
quotes.translation: 显然，有多少种人就有多少种鬼魂与幻象。它们对自身处境的警觉或迟钝程度，正如你对自身处境的感知一样。然而，无论在人格还是形态上，它们都未完全聚焦于物质实相——这是它们的主要区别。某些幻象是存续人格因挥之不去的深层焦虑而投射的思想形态。它们展现的强迫性行为模式，在你们日常经验中亦屡见不鲜。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You create many of your own difficulties, if not all of them. This is true for all individuals. The inner psychological state is projected outward, gaining physical reality. This holds true regardless of the nature of that inner psychological state. The way that this is done has been discussed often and is on record in the material. I suggest you read it. The rules apply to everyone. You can use this for your own benefit and change your conditions, once you realize what the rules are.
quotes.translation: 你们制造了自身大部分（若非全部）的困境。这对所有个体皆然。内在心理状态向外投射，获得物质实相。无论这种内在心理状态的性质如何，此法则始终成立。实现方式已在资料中多次讨论并记录在案。我建议你们阅读。这些法则适用于所有人。一旦认清法则，你便能善用其利己，改变自身境遇。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The soul or entity is always in a state of flux, or learning, and of developments that have to do with subjective experience rather than with time or space. This is not nearly as mysterious as it might sound. Each of my readers plays a game in which the egotistical conscious self pretends not to know what the whole self definitely does know. Since the ego is definitely a part of the whole self, then it must necessarily be basically aware of such knowledge. In its intense focus in physical reality, however, it pretends not to know, until it feels able to utilize the information in physical terms.
quotes.translation: 灵魂或存有始终处于流变、学习与发展的状态，这些发展关乎主观经验而非时间或空间。这并不像听上去那般神秘。每位读者都在玩一场游戏：自我意识假装不知道全我确知之事。既然自我无疑是全我的一部分，它必然在根本上知晓这些知识。然而，由于它强烈聚焦于物质实相，便假装不知，直到它感觉能够以物质方式运用这些信息为止。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: He has had many experiences in which he glimpsed momentarily the rich otherness within physical reality. He has known heightened perceptions of a unique nature. Never before, however, has he stepped firmly, while awake, into another level of reality, where he allowed himself to sense the continual vivid connection between worlds. He hid his own purpose from himself, as many of you do. At the same time he was pursuing it, of course, as all of you are working toward your own goals.
quotes.translation: 他曾多次经历瞬间瞥见物质实相中丰饶异质性的体验。他体验过独特性质的高度感知。然而，他从未在清醒状态下坚定踏入另一层实相，让自己感知世界之间持续生动的联结。他像你们许多人一样，向自己隐藏了自身目的。当然，与此同时他也在追寻它——正如你们所有人都在朝着自己的目标努力。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 715
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: At this point many variations in behavior emerge, each the result of individual background, knowledge, and habit. The surroundings in which the dead find themselves will often vary. Vivid hallucinations may form experience quite as real as any in mortal life. Now, I have told you that thoughts and emotions form physical reality, and they form after-death experience. This does not mean that the experiences are not valid, any more than it means that physical life is not valid.
quotes.translation: 此时会出现多种行为变体，每种都是个人背景、知识与习惯的结果。死者所处的环境往往各不相同。生动的幻觉可能构成与尘世生活同样真实的体验。我曾告诉你们，思想与情感形成物质实相，它们同样形成死后经验。这并不意味着这些经验无效，正如它不意味着物质生活无效一样。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The next chapter will deal with your physical reality as it appears to me and others like me. This chapter will contain some rather fascinating points, for not only do you form the physical reality that you know, but you are also forming other quite valid environments in other realities by your present thoughts, desires and emotions.
quotes.translation: 下一章将探讨你们所知的物质实相，以我和同类者的视角呈现。这一章将包含相当引人入胜的观点，因为你们不仅构建了所知的物质实相，还通过当下的思想、欲望和情感，在其他实相中塑造着同样有效的环境。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Here is a copy of that outline, which was given to us in Session 510, January 19, 1970. As you'll see here, Seth calls me Ruburt, and Rob, Joseph. These names represent our entire personalities as distinguished from our present physically oriented selves.

quotes.text: Ego failure may result. Development of the inner senses is a much more effective method of perceiving other realities, and followed correctly, the ego is not only stronger but more flexible, and consciousness even of physical reality is increased. Such development becomes an unfolding and a natural expansion of the whole personality.
quotes.translation: 自我可能因此失败。发展内在感官是感知其他实相更有效的方法，若正确遵循，自我不仅更强大且更具弹性，甚至对物质实相的意识也会增强。这种发展将成为整个人格的自然展开与扩展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The plants awakened before the animals--and there are reasons for these varying degrees of "wakefulness" that have nothing to do basically with the differentiations of specieshood as defined by science from the outside, but have to do with the inner affiliations of consciousness, and with species or families of consciousness. Those affiliations fell into being as all of the consciousnesses that were embarked upon physical reality divided up (long pause) the almost unimaginable creative achievements that would be responsible for the physically effective world.
quotes.translation: 植物比动物更早觉醒——这些不同程度的"觉醒"有其原因，本质上与科学从外部定义的物种分化无关，而是关乎意识的内在联结，以及意识物种或家族。当所有投身物质实相的意识开始分化时（长停顿），这些联结便应运而生，承担起创造物理有效世界所需的几乎难以想象的成就。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The episode also mirrored his beliefs, for to his way of thinking he would have to relinquish certain freedoms, and this he was not ready to do. The events basically exist at once, though at your level you have to perceive them in time. As your intimate daily reality can be involved with and colored by probabilities, brought into your experience by your own desires and beliefs, so is your mass culture, world history, and species orientation colored by probable events that do not fit into your officially recognized idea of physical reality.
quotes.translation: 这个插曲也反映了他的信念，因为按照他的思维方式，他必须放弃某些自由，而他尚未准备好这样做。这些事件本质上同时存在，尽管在你们的层面必须按时间顺序感知。正如你们亲密的日常实相可能被概率影响并着色，由自身欲望和信念带入体验，你们的群体文化、世界历史乃至物种取向，同样被那些不符合官方认可物质实相概念的概率事件所着色。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 694
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The psychological frameworks behind physical reality are also composed of energy, and are the building blocks that I have mentioned earlier. Their expansion is not limited by any of your known, or misinterpreted, laws of space or time or thermodynamics, since they exist in a dimension where such laws simply do not apply.
quotes.translation: 物质实相背后的心理框架同样由能量构成，是我先前提到的积木。它们的扩展不受任何已知或误解的空间、时间或热力学定律限制，因为它们存在于这些定律根本不适用的维度中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It is your loss. Now, there is a way--when you are involved in physical activity, and even intense mental work--to change the inner focus so that you are aware of two realities at once and can manipulate quite easily in the physical reality as you must. Now, you ask your Bega, for I have told him the message, and I have told him to tell you. We shall see how good he is. And I want to know what he tells you for I want to see how he is delivering my suggestions.
quotes.translation: 这是你们的损失。现在有一种方法——当你们从事身体活动甚至高强度脑力工作时——可以转换内在焦点，使你们同时觉察两个实相，并能在必须处理的物质实相中轻松运作。现在，去问你们的贝加吧，因为我已经把讯息告诉他，并让他转告你们。我们且看他表现如何。我想知道他告诉你们的内容，因为我要观察他是如何传达我的建议的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You can intellectually understand what I am telling you, but the brain （shaking head） cannot experience reality directly. This experience must come from the mind, through use of the inner senses. I want it understood that camouflage physical reality is indeed a reality, even while it is a distortion of something else.
quotes.translation: 你可以在理智上理解我所说的话，但大脑（摇头）无法直接体验实相。这种体验必须来自心灵，通过使用内在感官。我希望你们明白，伪装物质实相确实是一种实相，即使它是对其他事物的扭曲。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: I am again, as I have said often, an energy personality essence, which means quite simply that I am a personality who does not now operate within the physical reality. I can at times impress your physical reality, but the focus of my existence no longer involves a three-dimensional psychological structure. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 我再次强调，正如我常说的，我是一个能量人格本质，简单来说，我是一个现在不在物质实相中运作的人格。我有时可以影响你们的物质实相，但我存在的焦点不再涉及三维心理结构。（停顿。）

quotes.text: Now, no psychological structure is easy to describe in words. Simply to explain the nature of personality as it is generally known, all kinds of terms are used: id, subconscious, ego, superego; all of these to differentiate the interweaving actions that make up the physical personality. The dreaming self is just as complicated. So you can say that certain portions of it deal with physical reality, physical manipulation, and plans; some with deeper levels of creativity and achievement that insure physical survival; some with communication, with even more extensive elements of the personality now generally unknown; some with the continuing experience and existence of what you may call the soul or overall individual entity, the true multidimensional self.
quotes.translation: 现在，任何心理结构都难以用言语描述。仅仅为了解释一般所知的人格本质，就使用了各种术语：本我、潜意识、自我、超我；所有这些都是为了区分构成物质人格的交织行动。做梦的自己同样复杂。所以你可以说，它的某些部分处理物质实相、物质操控和计划；某些部分处理更深层次的创造力和成就，以确保物质生存；某些部分处理沟通，涉及现在普遍未知的更广泛的人格元素；某些部分处理你所谓的灵魂或整体个体实体的持续体验和存在，即真正的多维自己。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: If, however, you pause first and wait a moment, you can begin to glimpse the environment that serves as a stage: the natural landscape of the dream reality. In waking life, if you want to disconnect yourself from an event or place, you try to move away from it in space. In dream reality events occur in a different fashion, and places spring up about you. If you meet with people or events not of your liking, then you must simply move your attention away from them, and they will disappear as far as your experience is concerned. In physical reality you can move fairly freely through space, but you do not travel from one city to another, for example, unless you want to. Intent is invoked. This is so obvious that its significance escapes you: but it is intent that moves you through space, and that is behind all of your physical locomotion. You utilize ships, automobiles, trains, airplanes, because you want to go to another place, and certain vehicles work best under certain conditions.
quotes.translation: 然而，如果你先暂停片刻，你就能开始瞥见作为舞台的环境：梦境实相的自然景观。在清醒生活中，如果你想与某个事件或地点断开联系，你会试图在空间中远离它。在梦境实相中，事件以不同的方式发生，地点在你周围涌现。如果你遇到不喜欢的人或事件，那么你只需将注意力从它们身上移开，就你的体验而言，它们就会消失。在物质实相中，你可以相当自由地在空间中移动，但例如，你不会从一个城市旅行到另一个城市，除非你想。意图被调用。这如此明显，以至于其意义被你忽略：但正是意图让你在空间中移动，并且它在你所有物理运动背后。你使用船只、汽车、火车、飞机，因为你想去另一个地方，某些交通工具在特定条件下效果最佳。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Past associations merge with present reality and form a pattern. Mentally, a part of you actually starts out upon each street -- a projected mental image. Period. As you stand there, then, in this case two such projected images go out onto streets Three and Four. To some extent these images experience "what will happen" if you yourself take one direction or the other. That information is returned to you instantaneously, and you make your decision accordingly. Say you choose Street Four. Physically you begin to walk in that direction. Street Four becomes your physical reality. You accept that experience in your prime sequence of events. You have, however, already sent out an energized mental image of yourself into Street Three, and you cannot withdraw that energy.
quotes.translation: 过去的联想与现在的实相融合，形成一种模式。在心理上，你的某一部分实际上在每条街道上出发——一个投射的心理影像。句号。当你站在那里时，在这种情况下，两个这样的投射影像会前往第三和第四街道。在某种程度上，这些影像体验着"如果你自己选择其中一个方向将会发生什么"。这些信息会即时返回给你，你据此做出决定。假设你选择了第四街道。你在物理上开始朝那个方向行走。第四街道成为你的物质实相。你在主要事件序列中接受那个体验。然而，你已经将充满能量的心理影像发送到第三街道，并且你无法撤回那股能量。

quotes.text: Consciousness within the body knows that its existence is within the body's context, and apart from it at the same time. In ordinary life during the day consciousness often takes a recess, so to speak -- it daydreams, or otherwise experiences itself as somewhat apart from the body's reality. At night, in sleep, the self's consciousness takes longer, freer recesses from physical reality, and does this as spontaneously as the body itself walks. These experiences are not hypothetical. They happen to each person. On such occasions, each person is to some extent aware of a kind of comprehension that is not dependent upon the accumulation of data, but of a deeper kind of experience and direct encounter with the reality from which the world emerges.
quotes.translation: 身体内的意识知道自己的存在是在身体的脉络中，同时又与之分离。在白天日常生活中，意识常常会休息，可以说——它做白日梦，或以其他方式体验自己与身体实相略有分离。在夜晚睡眠中，自己的意识会从物质实相中享受更长、更自由的休息，并且像身体行走一样自发地做到这一点。这些体验并非假设。它们发生在每个人身上。在这种时候，每个人都在某种程度上意识到一种理解，这种理解不依赖于数据的积累，而是依赖于更深层次的体验和与实相的直接相遇，世界正是从这实相中涌现出来的。

quotes.text: Actors visit casting agencies so that they know what plays need their services. In your dreams you visit "casting agencies." You are aware of the various plays being considered for physical production. In the dream state, then, often you familiarize yourself with dramas that are of a probable nature. If enough interest is shown, if enough actors apply, if enough resources are accumulated, the play will go on. When you are in other than your normally conscious state, you visit that creative inner agency in which all physical productions must have their beginning. You meet with others, who for their own reasons are interested in the same kind of drama. Following our analogy, the technicians, the actors, the writers all assemble -- only in this case the result will be a live event rather than a televised one. There are disaster films being planned, educational programs, religious dramas. All of these will be encountered in full-blown physical reality.
quotes.translation: 演员们去试镜机构了解哪些戏剧需要他们的服务。在梦境中，你们会去"试镜机构"。你们会了解那些正在考虑进行物质化演出的各种戏剧。因此，在梦境状态中，你们常常熟悉那些具有或然性质的戏剧。如果表现出足够的兴趣，如果有足够的演员申请，如果积累了足够的资源，这出戏就会上演。当你们处于正常意识状态之外时，你们会造访那个所有物质化演出都必须从那里开始的创造性内在机构。你们会与其他人会面，他们出于各自的原因对同一类戏剧感兴趣。按照我们的类比，技术人员、演员、作家都聚集在一起——只是在这种情况下，结果将是一个现场事件，而不是电视转播的事件。有灾难片在策划中，有教育节目，有宗教戏剧。所有这些都将以完整的物质实相呈现。
