quotes.text: They cast their light over historical events because they are responsible for those events. They mix and merge the inner, unseen but felt, eternal psychic experience of man with the temporal events of his physical days, and form a combination that structures thoughts and beliefs from civilization to civilization. In Framework 2 the interior power of nature is ever-changing. The dreams, hopes, aspirations and fears of man interact in a constant motion that then forms the events of your world. That interaction includes not only man, of course, but the emotional reality of all earthly consciousnesses as well, from a microbe to a scholar, from a frog to a star. You interpret the phenomena of your world according to the mythic characteristics that you have accepted. You organize physical reality, then, through ideas. You use only those perceptions that serve to give those ideas validity. The physical body itself is quite capable of putting the world together in different fashions than the one that is familiar to you.
quotes.translation: 它们将光芒投射到历史事件上，因为它们对这些事件负有责任。它们将人类内在的、看不见但能感受到的、永恒的心灵体验，与人类物质岁月中的时间性事件混合并融合，形成一种组合，这种组合从一种文明到另一种文明构建着思想和信念。在架构二中，自然的内在力量是不断变化的。人类的梦想、希望、渴望和恐惧在持续的运动中相互作用，然后形成你们世界的事件。当然，这种相互作用不仅包括人类，还包括从微生物到学者、从青蛙到星辰的所有地球意识的情感实相。你们根据自己所接受的神话特征来解读你们世界的现象。因此，你们通过观念来组织物质实相。你们只使用那些有助于赋予这些观念有效性的感知。物质身体本身完全有能力以不同于你们所熟悉的方式将世界组合在一起。

source_raw.title: eth's statement at the end of dictation for the 815th session, "I will try to begin work on our book in a more predictable fashion," reflected his good intent, but things didn't turn out that way. Jane and I let the holiday season intervene to some extent, and Session 816, which came through the day after Christmas, didn't concern book work at all. Then, starting in early January, we held eight sessions having to do with questions we'd put off dealing with for a long time; some were personal and some were not. We stayed with our Monday-Saturday evening session routine, though, and kept busy with all of our other projects.1

quotes.text: But in your terms this was still largely a dream world, though it was fully fashioned. It had, generally speaking, all of the species that you now know. These all correlated with the multitudinous kinds of consciousnesses that had clamored for release, and those consciousnesses were spontaneously endowed by All That Is with those forms that fit their requirements. You had the birth of individualized consciousness as you think of it into physical context. Those consciousnesses were individualized before the beginning, but not manifest. But individualized consciousness was not quite all that bold. It did not attach itself completely to its earthly forms at the start, but rested often within its "ancient" divine heritage. In your terms, it is as if the earth and all of its creatures were partially dreaming, and not as focused within physical reality as they are now.
quotes.translation: 但用你们的话说，这仍然主要是一个梦境世界，尽管它已经被完全塑造出来。一般来说，它拥有你们现在所知道的所有物种。这些都与那些渴望释放的众多意识种类相关联，而那些意识被一切万有自发地赋予了符合它们需求的形态。你们有了你们所认为的个体化意识进入物质背景的诞生。那些意识在开始之前就已经个体化了，但并未显现。但个体化意识并不那么大胆。它一开始并没有完全依附于它的地球形态，而是常常停留在它"古老的"神圣传承中。用你们的话说，就好像地球及其所有生物都在半梦半醒之间，不像现在这样聚焦于物质实相中。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There are countless relationships between species that go unrecognized. The generations of all species interact. The genetic cues are not triggered on the proposition, obviously, that a species exists alone on the planet, but also in response to genetic sequences that operate in all of the species combined. The genetic system, again, is not closed nearly as much as supposed. That is, again, because the basic units of consciousness that build up matter--that form matter--are themselves endowed with a subjective acuteness. This also accounts for my earlier statement, that in usually understood terms the environment and its creatures "evolve" together. (Long pause.) Your position on the scale of awareness inclines you to categorize consciousnesses so that only your own familiar brand seems to fit the definition--so again here I remind you that consciousness is everywhere in the deepest terms, because All That Is disperses itself throughout physical reality. All portions of that reality have their own rights to existence, and purposes within it. So of course do all peoples, and the races.
quotes.translation: 物种之间存在着无数未被认识的关系。所有物种的世代都在相互作用。遗传线索的触发显然不是基于一个物种独自存在于行星上的假设，而是也对所有物种组合中运作的遗传序列做出反应。遗传系统再次被证明远没有人们假设的那样封闭。这再次是因为构成物质——形成物质——的意识基本单位本身就被赋予了主观的敏锐性。这也解释了我早先的说法，即按照通常的理解，环境及其生物是"共同进化"的。（长时间停顿。）你们在意识层级上的位置使你们倾向于对意识进行分类，以至于只有你们自己熟悉的那种似乎符合定义——所以在这里我再次提醒你们，在最深层的意义上，意识无处不在，因为一切万有将自身分散于整个物质实相中。该实相的所有部分都有其自身存在的权利，以及其中的目的。当然，所有民族和种族也是如此。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2

quotes.text: Nevertheless it also partakes of the strange unity that unites all personalities beneath the camouflage pattern, while at the same time it is only partially connected to the camouflage pattern. In some respects art creations are a meeting of the dream world and the world of camouflage patterns, but in a deeper way art creations represent the appearance or materialization in the actual element of physical time of inner realities. That is, the inner individualistic self forces its vision and knowledge into the world of camouflage pattern, giving its dreams a physical reality denied to the usual dream. And here the use of energy for this purpose is conscious, that is the strong hidden self actually makes use of the camouflage conscious self and molds the two into a reality that combines two planes. This I hope will become clear as you read it over.
quotes.translation: 然而，它也参与了那种奇特的统一性，这种统一性将伪装模式下的所有人格联合起来，同时它又只与伪装模式部分相连。在某些方面，艺术创作是梦境世界与伪装模式世界的交汇，但更深层次地，艺术创作代表了内在实相在物质时间的实际元素中的显现或物质化。也就是说，内在的个体化自我将其愿景和知识强行带入伪装模式的世界，赋予其梦境一种普通梦境所无法获得的物质实相。在这里，为此目的而使用能量是有意识的，也就是说，强大的隐藏自我实际上利用了伪装的意识自我，并将两者塑造成一个结合了两个层面的实相。我希望你们在重读时能明白这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Now I have told you that you may legitimately visit not only the past, present and future as it existed, or will exist in physical terms; but you may also visit realities which never existed in physical terms. In our earliest sessions I emphasized that the intensity regulated the duration of an experience. Now, many events that were only imagined and never took place, physically speaking, many such events still exist. They are simply not a part of your definition of reality. You may therefore visit a museum which was planned in the 16th century, but never built. Such a museum has a reality as real, you see, as the house in which you live. Ordinarily you only perceive physical reality. In projections you may visit other realities such as these also--which you may be tempted to call imaginary, but they are not.
quotes.translation: 现在我已经告诉过你们，你们不仅可以合法地造访过去、现在和未来，就像它们在物质层面上存在或将要存在的那样；你们还可以造访那些在物质层面上从未存在过的实相。在我们早期的课程中，我强调过强度调节着体验的持续时间。现在，许多事件只是被想象过，从未在物质层面上发生过，但许多这样的事件仍然存在。它们只是不属于你们对实相的定义的一部分。因此，你们可以造访一个在16世纪被规划但从未建造的博物馆。这样的博物馆具有与你们居住的房子一样真实的实相。通常你们只感知物质实相。在投射中，你们也可以造访诸如此类的其他实相——你们可能会倾向于称它们为想象的，但它们并非如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: I do not really waken however but continue dreaming. I'm downtown in the same town, with this group again. One girl asks me if Chuck stayed till nine last night and I say yes. Then one girl, not of the group, is crying. I say something about poetry and she says, well you d better talk fast because I've just about decided to stop writing poetry. She has light brown hair, rather dark circles under her eyes and is somewhat younger than I. I say that you can't just decide consciously to give up writing poetry, you d write it anyhow, though you could subconsciously make such a decision and never know about it at all. Then rather dramatically but beautifully I tell her that: "Poetry is your characteristic method of expression, your way of translating the data into physical reality and that even its rhythm is the rhythm of your heartbeat." Tell her that she can't give it up.
quotes.translation: 但我并未真正醒来，而是继续做梦。我在同一个城镇的市中心，又和这群人在一起。一个女孩问我查克昨晚是否待到九点，我说是的。然后一个不属于这群人的女孩在哭泣。我提到一些关于诗歌的事，她说：“那你最好快点说，因为我几乎决定不再写诗了。”她有着浅棕色头发，眼下有明显的黑眼圈，比我年轻一些。我说你不能仅仅有意识地决定放弃写诗，无论如何你都会写，尽管你可以在潜意识中做出这样的决定，却完全不自知。然后我相当戏剧化但优美地告诉她：“诗歌是你特有的表达方式，是你将资料转化为物质实相的方法，甚至它的节奏就是你心跳的节奏。”告诉她她无法放弃它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now I am only speaking because many of you have known that I was here. And it ill behooves me not to bid you welcome when you felt my presence. But in many of your discussions, there has only been surface thought and surface feelings... and we do not walk on the surface in this class. I would push your heads collectively and individually underneath... for you still do not understand that you create your physical reality! you form your blocks and shove them up upon the surface of the earth. You cannot solve the problems of your world on a surface level. If you could, you would have done it centuries ago. You must step out of your present perspective in order to see your world clearly. Here you are not to hide within the closet of 3 dimensionality and cry, "It is dark and I cannot see!" And refuse to use the inner light that can alone aid your vision.
quotes.translation: 我现在之所以说话，是因为你们许多人已经知道我在这里。当你们感受到我的存在时，我不该不欢迎你们。但在你们许多讨论中，只有表面的思想和表面的情感……而我们在课堂上不走表面。我会把你们的头集体地、个别地按下去……因为你们仍然不明白你们创造了你们的物质实相！你们形成你们的障碍，把它们推到地球表面。你们无法在表面层次解决你们世界的问题。如果你们能，几个世纪前就已经做到了。你们必须跳出当前的视角，才能看清你们的世界。在这里，你们不应躲在三维空间的壁橱里哭喊：“太黑了，我看不见！”并拒绝使用那唯一能帮助你们视力的内在之光。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: He acts, speaks, walks, talks, makes certain deductions. He responds to interior stimuli. The personality also operates within the dream state in ways that would not be considered normal in the waking state. He travels through space in moments. He speaks with those who do not exist within physical reality. He sees parents who have died in physical ways, and in his dreams he knows, on many occasions, what other characters think within the dream context.
quotes.translation: 他行动、说话、走路、交谈、做出某些推论。他对内在刺激做出反应。人格也在梦境状态中以在清醒状态中不被视为正常的方式运作。他在瞬间穿越空间。他与物质实相中不存在的人交谈。他看到在物质层面已故的父母，在梦中，他在许多情况下知道其他角色在梦境背景中的想法。

quotes.text: If you remember that beneath all, each unit of consciousness is aware of the position of each other unit, and that these units form all physical matter, then perhaps you can intuitively follow what I mean, for whatever knowledge man attains, whatever experience any one person accumulates, whatever arts or sciences you produce, all such information is instantly perceived at other levels of activity by each of the other units of consciousness that compose physical reality--whether those units form the shape of a rock, a raindrop, an apple, a cat, a frog or a shoe. Manufactured products are also composed of atoms and molecules that ride upon units of consciousness transformed into EE units, and hence into physical elements.
quotes.translation: 如果你记得在一切之下，每个意识单元都知道其他每个单元的位置，而这些单元形成所有物质，那么也许你能直觉地理解我的意思，因为无论人类获得什么知识，任何人积累什么经验，你们产生什么艺术或科学，所有这些信息都会立即被构成物质实相的其他每个意识单元在其他活动层面感知到——无论那些单元形成岩石、雨滴、苹果、猫、青蛙还是鞋子的形状。人造产品也由原子和分子组成，这些原子和分子承载着转化为EE单元的意识单元，进而转化为物质元素。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: When the ego is of such a rigid nature that it distorts physical reality out of all context, then however the personality had better rely upon the subconscious even in this respect, for the subconscious will at least perceive those elements of physical reality that immediately threaten the whole self.
quotes.translation: 当自我具有如此僵化的性质，以至于它扭曲物质实相脱离所有背景时，那么人格最好在这方面也依赖潜意识，因为潜意识至少会感知到那些直接威胁整个自我的物质实相元素。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The ego however is quite secure. It would exist regardless, now, of the particular theories of time which might be held, for it is strongly anchored as a specific manipulator of physical reality. And physical reality, believe it or not, is not dependent upon the theory of time as a series of moments.
quotes.translation: 然而自我相当安全。无论现在持有何种特定的时间理论，它都会存在，因为它作为物质实相的特定操控者被牢固地锚定。而物质实相，信不信由你，并不依赖于时间作为一系列时刻的理论。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now: When you properly understand how to use psychological time, then to some extent you can learn to alter the nature and focus of your consciousness. You can turn it in many directions. You can focus it in other ways, away from physical reality. This does not mean that you will be left high and dry here. It does mean that you will begin to explore the reality of yourselves, and of those other dimensions in which you have your existence.
quotes.translation: 现在：当你们正确理解如何运用心理时间时，就能在一定程度上学会改变意识的本质与焦点。你们可以将其转向许多方向，也能以其他方式聚焦意识，使之脱离物质实相。这并不意味着你们会被困于此地孤立无援，而是意味着你们将开始探索自身实相，以及你们所存在的那些其他维度。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your physicists know that time does not exist, basically, as a series of moments, one following the other. Therefore my earlier remark that physical reality was not dependent upon time as a series of moments should be obvious.
quotes.translation: 你们的物理学家知道，时间本质上并非由一连串前后相继的瞬间组成。因此，我之前所说的"物质实相并不依赖于作为瞬间序列的时间"应当显而易见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Philosophy should allow you to deal with them and not to avoid them. In one case of course there is nothing to avoid. Moment points, as I have discussed them, will clear up many of these points for you. There is every reason to explore inner reality, but this exploration should lead you to understand the nature of physical reality also. Perhaps your physical existence could be compared with an excellent book, given to you by a teacher.
quotes.translation: 哲学应当让你们能够处理这些问题，而非回避它们。当然，在某种情况下根本无需回避。我所讨论的"瞬间点"将帮你们厘清许多这类要点。探索内在实相有充分的理由，但这种探索也应引导你们理解物质实相的本质。或许你们的物质存在可以比作老师赠予的一本好书。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Other concepts are really not basically workable even in your own physical reality. A rigid, dogmatic concept of good and evil will force you to perceive physical existence as a battleground of opposing forces, with the poor unwary soul almost as a buffer. Or you will think of the poor soul as a blackboard eraser, slapped between two hands -- one good and one evil.
quotes.translation: 其他概念即便在你们自身的物质实相中也根本行不通。僵化教条的善恶观念会迫使你们将物质存在视为对立力量的战场，而可怜的无知灵魂几乎成了缓冲带。或者你们会认为这可怜的灵魂是块黑板擦，被夹在善恶两只手掌之间拍打。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 719
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Every nerve and fiber within the physical image has an inner purpose that is not seen, and that serves to connect the inner self with physical reality--in other words, that allows the inner self to create physical reality.
quotes.translation: 物质形象中的每条神经与纤维都具有看不见的内在目的，这些目的连接着内在自我与物质实相——换言之，它们让内在自我得以创造物质实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Therefore, you have greater use of symbolism in the dream state, for you are aware of past and future symbols. These vary in intensity; often they cluster together. Such multidimensional symbols will appear then in many ways, not simply visually. They will affect not only your own physical reality, but all realities in which you are involved. In a manner of speaking the symbols that you know are but the tail end of greater symbols.
quotes.translation: 因此，你们在梦境状态中能更充分地运用象征符号，因为你们能感知过去与未来的符号。这些符号强度各异，常常聚集出现。这类多维符号会以多种方式显现，不仅限于视觉层面。它们不仅会影响你们自身的物质实相，还会影响你们所涉足的所有实相。从某种角度说，你们所知的符号不过是更宏大符号的末端。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I affect reality, physical reality, because men's minds are changed according to their ideas, and we shall change these ideas for the better. The ideas, working through men, will affect physical reality for the better. I am here more often than you think. Never, however, in a prying manner.
quotes.translation: 我影响实相，影响物质实相，因为人们的心智会随着他们的观念而改变，而我们将把这些观念变得更好。这些观念通过人运作，将改善物质实相。我在这里的次数比你以为的要多得多。然而，我从不以窥探的方式出现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: As you create physical matter constantly without knowing that you do so, so also you create constantly a dream universe, and this dream universe is as individual as your environment in the physical world. There is also a chemical reaction here, for without dreaming the physical organism could not exist. With your outer senses, you perceive but the camouflage physical reality which the physical senses are equipped to perceive. In the dream universe you are however free, and familiar, with both space and time in a manner which is denied you in the waking state. Where indeed are your dream locations? Where in space is the street upon which you walk in a dream?
quotes.translation: 正如你不断创造物质实相却不知自己在做一样，你也持续创造着一个梦境宇宙，这个梦境宇宙与你在物质世界中的环境一样独特。这里也存在化学反应，因为没有梦境，物质有机体就无法存在。借助外在感官，你只能感知到物质感官被设计去感知的伪装物质实相。然而，在梦境宇宙中，你既自由又熟悉空间与时间，其方式在清醒状态下是被禁止的。你梦中的地点究竟在哪里？你在梦中行走的那条街，在空间中位于何处？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You are truly multidimensional personalities, as I have said before. At some point in your development you will become more and more aware of the true nature of your identity. There is, for example, a part of you who is very aware of the pulsations you have just been discussing, and who is aware of the pulse-like nature of memory. When the pulse is in this physical reality, then you, as you know yourselves, have memory of this existence. When the pulse is in another dimension, there is memory of that existence. Now a portion of your entire identity has memory of both. The entire personality structure dwells in many dimensions, and simultaneously.
quotes.translation: 正如我之前所说，你们确实是多维度的存有。在你们发展的某个阶段，你会越来越意识到你身份的真正本质。例如，你的一部分非常清楚你刚才讨论的那些脉动，也清楚记忆的脉冲性质。当脉冲处于这个物质实相时，你——即你所认识的自己——便拥有对这一存在的记忆。当脉冲处于另一个维度时，便拥有对那个存在的记忆。现在，你整体身份的一部分拥有对两者的记忆。整个的人格结构同时存在于许多维度中。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I shall of course take advantage of the opportunity, but then you will have time to speak to me at your leisure. There are many points to be considered, and these matters certainly cannot be covered in one evening such as this. I hinted at our last discussion that it is indeed within the ability of the human personality to become aware of other realities while still keeping contact with physical reality. Manipulation in the physical universe is of course a necessity, but there are ways by which the human individual can become aware of other quite valid realities, and still maintain balance and control within his own more usual field of activity.
quotes.translation: 我当然会利用这个机会，但那时你将有闲暇时间与我交谈。有许多要点需要考虑，这些事当然不可能在一个这样的晚上就涵盖。我在我们上次讨论中暗示过，人类人格确实有能力在保持与物质实相接触的同时，意识到其他实相。在物质宇宙中运作当然是必要的，但有些方法能让个体意识到其他同样有效的实相，同时仍能在自己更惯常的活动领域中保持平衡与控制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This is a voluntary arrangement. The boy needs the additional vitality. I do not believe the boy will live to old age. The father loaned this vitality and helps the boy, knowing beforehand the boy's difficulty. The boy is unable to relate fully to physical reality. When the man called your father dies his energy will return to the self who is waiting. That self will then call back the energy which it has loaned to Ruth's son.
quotes.translation: 这是一个自愿的安排。那个男孩需要额外的生命力。我不认为那个男孩会活到老年。父亲借出了这份生命力并帮助男孩，事先就知道男孩的困境。男孩无法完全与物质实相连接。当你称为父亲的那个人去世时，他的能量将回到那个等待着的自己那里。那个自己随后会召回它借给露丝儿子的能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: These connections are not even suspected, simply because your scientists do not seriously consider that physical reality is the result of any such interrelation. The fact is however that the full function of the nervous system is not known, for the proper questions have not been asked.
quotes.translation: 这些关联甚至未被怀疑，仅仅因为你们的科学家没有认真考虑物质实相是任何此类相互关系的结果。然而事实是，神经系统的全部功能尚不为人所知，因为正确的问题从未被提出过。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is possible (underlined) that the psychedelic experience for these individuals would involve consciousness expansion directed toward (underlined) usual physical reality, and bring about a more unified personality structure from society's standpoint. Insanity as a term means nothing. All mental life is characterized by divergent perceptions of any given set of Sense data that is recognized as Reality, with a capital R.
quotes.translation: 这些个体的迷幻体验很可能（强调）涉及朝向（强调）通常物理实相的意识扩展，并从社会立场带来更统一的人格结构。疯狂一词毫无意义。所有心智生活都以对任何被视为实相（大写R）的特定感官资料的不同感知为特征。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Various portions of the self therefore face physical reality at any given time as the ego. The process is constant. An attempt to maintain the status quo is of course natural on the part of the ego, but when this becomes a stubborn effort to maintain dominancy then the difficulties arise. The self throws up those portions of itself that it considers most able to handle the changing physical environment at any given time.
quotes.translation: 因此，自我的各个部分在任何特定时刻都以自我的身份面对物理实相。这个过程是持续的。自我维持现状的努力自然是正常的，但当这变成顽固维持主导地位的企图时，困难便随之而来。自我会抛出它认为在任何特定时刻最能处理不断变化的物理环境的那部分自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is very possible for one dreamer who is a Speaker, to go to the aid of another individual who is having some difficulties in an inner reality within the dream state. The idea of guardian angels of course is highly connected here. A good Speaker is as effective within one reality as he is within the other, creating psychic frameworks within physical reality as well as within interior environments. Many artists, poets, and musicians are Speakers, translating one world in terms of another, forming psychic structures that exist in both with great vitality -- structures that may be perceived from more than one reality at once.
quotes.translation: 一个身为说者的做梦者，很可能去帮助另一个在梦境状态的内在实相中遇到困难的个体。守护天使的概念当然与此高度相关。一个好的说者在一个实相中与在另一个实相中同样有效，在物理实相中创造心灵架构，也在内在环境中创造。许多艺术家、诗人和音乐家都是说者，以一种世界翻译另一种世界，形成在两者中都充满活力的心灵结构——这些结构可能同时从多个实相中被感知。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now, in one sense, all selves are projections of the whole or that which is. New universes such as your own constantly come into existence. Systems and planes far different develop and in turn form other systems. Infinity has meaning only in subjective and psychic terms. The physical brain cannot contain the idea of infinity. The concept will not fit into three dimensional terms. The whole self, the inner self moves within the concept of infinity as you move within physical reality through space. Infinity contains all that will ever be known, and, of course, all that will ever be known is known within the spacious present .
quotes.translation: 现在，从某种意义上说，所有自我都是整体或存在本身的投射。像你们这样的新宇宙不断诞生。截然不同的系统和层面发展出来，并反过来形成其他系统。无限只在主观和心灵层面有意义。物理大脑无法容纳无限的概念。这个概念无法适应三维术语。整体自我、内在自我在无限的概念中移动，就像你们在物理实相中穿越空间一样。无限包含所有将被知晓的一切，当然，所有将被知晓的一切都在广阔当下中被知晓。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is, therefore, as if your thoughts appear within other realities as objects -- alive and vital in themselves, growing into other systems as flowers or trees grow up seemingly from nothing within physical reality. These can then be used as the raw material, so to speak, in certain other systems. They are the given "natural data," the raw material of creativity in the realities that you help seed but do not perceive.
quotes.translation: 因此，仿佛你们的思想在其他实相中显现为物体——本身充满活力和生命力，像花朵或树木在物理实相中看似凭空生长一样，成长进入其他系统。这些随后可以被用作某些其他系统中的原材料，可以这么说。它们是给定的"自然数据"，是你们帮助播种但未感知到的实相中创造力的原始材料。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: History, as you know it, represents but one single light upon which you focus. You interpret the events that you see therein, and you project upon its glimmer your interpretation of events that may occur. So entranced is your concentration, that when you wonder about the nature of reality you automatically confine your question to this one small flickering moment that you call physical reality. When you ponder upon the aspects of God, you unthinkingly speak of the creator of that one light. That light is unique, and if you truly understood what it was, you would indeed understand the nature of true reality.
quotes.translation: 你们所知的历史，仅代表你们聚焦的一束光。你们解读在其中看到的事件，并将你们对可能发生事件的解读投射到它的微光上。你们的专注如此着迷，以至于当你们思考实相的本质时，会不自觉地将问题局限于这个你们称为物理实相的小小闪烁瞬间。当你们思索神的面向时，会不假思索地谈论那束光的创造者。那光是独特的，如果你们真正理解它是什么，你们确实会理解真实实相的本质。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The creative abilities have full reign within the dream state, and it is here that the personality first tests its creative intensities and methods. The personality's physical environment therefore is greatly colored and formed by his dream existence. There is some leakage from waking-life experience to dream experience, but this leakage usually represents the material needed, or the problem to be solved. Mental events and dream events are primary. The individual first manipulates situations within the dream reality, and then transposes his characteristic method of handling them upon the physical reality.
quotes.translation: 创造力在梦境状态中得以完全施展，人格在此首次测试其创造强度与方法。因此，人格的物理环境深受其梦境存在的影响与塑造。清醒生活经验与梦境经验之间存在某种渗透，但这种渗透通常代表所需素材或待解问题。心灵事件与梦境事件是首要的。个体先在梦境实相中处理情境，然后将处理情境的独特方式转译到物理实相中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: These are unfoldings, as the inner self materializes what is already latent into physical actuality. Now there may be areas in which the inner self is simply not interested. There may be areas in which it is simply less proficient. The inner self is a developing entity, not a finished product. The whole idea of physical reality, individually speaking, is the emergence of experience within your particular system.
quotes.translation: 这些是内在自我将潜藏之物具体化为物理实相的过程。内在自我可能对某些领域毫无兴趣，也可能在某些领域不够精通。内在自我是正在发展的存有，而非成品。就个体而言，物理实相的整体概念，就是经验在你们特定系统内的显现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The basic source of your difficulty was not new. It did not even, except superficially, represent a dangerous lapse or relapse on your part, into those truly dangerous and quite disastrous negative battles of thoughts, which eventually in any individual can and often do lead the integrated self into annihilation. The illness did represent, however, a needed warning, materialized into physical reality as illness. A warning that after all there had been a recent tendency on your part, though slight, to slide into negative thinking. The illness was meant to bring you up short, to make you think.
quotes.translation: 你困境的根本来源并非新鲜事。它甚至——除表面现象外——并不代表你陷入那些真正危险且极具破坏性的负面思想战役，这种战役最终在任何个体中都可能导致整合自我走向湮灭。然而，这场疾病确实代表一个必要的警告，以疾病形式具体化为物理实相。这个警告提醒你：毕竟你最近有滑向负面思维的倾向——尽管轻微。疾病旨在让你猛然醒悟，促使你思考。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: He sees more than you do, or more than his mother does, because he does not yet realize that you only accept certain patterns and reject others. By the time he is born he has already learned to accept his parents' idea of what reality is. In a large sensehe begins to train himself to focus only upon what you would call physical reality, though he still partially perceives other fields that you do not accept.
quotes.translation: 他比你——或比他母亲——看到更多，因为他尚未意识到你们只接受特定模式而排斥其他。到他出生时，他已学会接受父母对实相的定义。从广义而言，他开始训练自己只聚焦于你们所谓的物理实相，尽管他仍能部分感知你们不接纳的其他领域。

quotes.text: Such a consciousness is at a state of being in which its reality generates more energy and power than it can physically express in its brilliant intersection with physical reality. The "sparks" generated by each instant of its existence cause additional experiences, perceptions, that will not fit in the known moment of the present -- for by then in your terms that present has already vanished into the past.
quotes.translation: 这样的意识处于一种存在状态：其产生的实相能量与力量远超其在物理实相璀璨交汇点所能表达的。其存在每一瞬间产生的"火花"引发额外经验与感知，这些无法纳入已知的当下时刻——因为在你们的时间体系中，那个当下早已消逝于过去。

quotes.text: You can readily see, therefore, how important your subjective feelings really are. This knowledge -- that your universe is idea construction -- can immediately give you clues that enable you to change your environment and circumstances beneficially. When you do not understand the nature of the soul, and do not realize that your thoughts and feelings form physical reality, then you feel powerless to change it. In later chapters of this book, I hope to give you some practical information that will enable you to alter practically the very nature and structure of daily life.
quotes.translation: 因此你们能清楚看到主观感受何其重要。这个认知——即你们的宇宙是意念建构——能立即提供线索，使你们得以有利地改变环境与处境。当你们不了解灵魂的本质，不明白思想与情感形成物理实相时，就会感到无力改变。在本书后续章节中，我希望能提供一些实用信息，使你们能实际改变日常生活的本质与结构。

quotes.text: In your York Beach experience had you not been able through your peculiar creative abilities to form those images outside of yourselves, and so endow them with a physical reality, you might very well have instead turned yourself into schizophrenic personalities. quotes.text: In a natural state, many children would die stillborn for the same reasons, or would be naturally aborted. quotes.translation: 你不仅是其他独立自我的一部分——每个自我都聚焦于自身实相——而且彼此间存在着交感关系。例如，凭借这种关系，你的经验不必受限于物质感知机制。你可以汲取属于这些其他独立自我的知识，学会将注意力从物质实相转移，掌握新的感知方法，从而扩展对实相的概念并极大丰富自身经验。

quotes.text: The inner senses alone are equipped and able to process and perceive other reality systems. Even the distortions can be kept at a minimum with training. quotes.translation: 唯有内在感官具备处理与感知其他实相系统的能力。即便经过训练，扭曲现象仍可降至最低。滥用迷幻药物会严重动摇有效操控物质实相所必需的学习反应模式，破坏精微连接，干扰电磁功能。

quotes.text: Egos concept of itself as a rock of unchanging identity is highly ludicrous, since its perceptions constantly change it from what it was. It is not a thing proceeding, by any means. This is not to deny the human aspects of the ego, for the ego is also somewhat like a light carried in front of the inner self, a light that gives meaning to the physical universe and to its objects. It enables the inner self to manipulate within physical reality. It translates outer data to the inner personality.
quotes.translation: 自我将自身视为永恒不变身份之磐石的概念极为荒谬，因其感知不断将其从原有状态改变。它绝非某种持续前进的实体。这并非否定自我的人性面向——自我亦如内在自体前方擎举的明灯，赋予物质宇宙及其客体意义。它使内在自体得以在物质实相中运作，并将外在数据转译给内在人格。

quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Dream images, not astral projections, operate within certain electrical limits, limits that form the boundaries of the dream universe. Dream images are nevertheless almost fibrous projections, almost a thinned-out composition, more plastic basically than physical matter, but composed of a number of the same properties. For again there must be this connection between the nature of dreams and the matter of physical reality.
quotes.translation: 梦境影像（而非星光体投射）在特定电磁界限内运作，这些界限构成梦宇宙的疆域。然而梦境影像近乎纤维状的投射，几乎是一种稀薄化的构成，本质上比物质更具可塑性，却由若干相同属性组成。因为梦境本质与物质实相之间必须存在这种关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: "Nothing in the universe is ever lost, or mislaid, or wasted, so the energy of your own thoughts, while they are still your own thoughts, helps to form the natural attributes of physical realities that you do not perceive. So is your own world formed by units of consciousness. Its natural elements are the glistening remnants of other units of consciousness that you do not see."
quotes.translation: "宇宙中没有任何事物会遗失、错置或浪费，因此当你仍拥有自己的思想时，其能量便协助形成你未感知的物质实相之自然属性。你们的世界正是由意识单位所构成。其自然元素是你们看不见的其他意识单位之闪烁残迹。"
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now there are personalities developed enough to do this. And each act of leaping, so to speak, forms a new thread. Now following through with our analogy, imagine yourself A. We will start you off in physical reality at thread A, though you have already traversed many other threads to get where you are. We are merely beginning with thread A since this is your present situation.
quotes.translation: 确实存在发展至足以做到此事的存有。每一次跳跃行为（姑且如此比喻）都会形成新的丝线。延续我们的类比，请想象你为A。我们暂且将你置于物质实相中的丝线A起点——尽管你已穿越无数其他丝线才抵达此处。我们仅以丝线A为起点，因这是你当前的处境。

quotes.text: This characteristic of materializing thoughts and emotions into physical realities is an attribute of the soul. Now in your reality, these thoughts are made physical. In other realities, they may be "constructed" in an entirely different fashion. So your soul, that which you are, constructs your physical daily reality for you from the nature of your thoughts and expectations.
quotes.translation: 将思想情感物质化为物质实相的特性，是灵魂的属性。在你们的实相中，这些思想被转化为物质形态。在其他实相中，它们可能以全然不同的方式"建构"。因此，你的灵魂——即你的本质——正根据你思想与期待的本质，为你构建每日的物质实相。

quotes.text: The experimentation with daily predictions will show you quite clearly, with practice, the nature of such distortions, as you see the difference between the predicted event and the event that occurs. Also for economy and for the reason given above, symbols may stand for more than one physical reality, and so may they in some of the earlier predictions given in this material.
quotes.translation: 每日预测的实验将让你清楚看到这类扭曲的本质——随着练习，你会观察到预测事件与实际发生事件之间的差异。同时为节省能量及上述原因，象征可能代表不止一种物质实相，本资料中某些早期预测也是如此。

quotes.text: This particular kind of dream is concerned with working out certain problems concerning your physical reality, and they are usually not precognitive. They might appear precognitive if you perceived them, because many of the events contained therein will later occur in fact. They are not precognitive however, for in a large measure they bring about, or cause, physical events.
quotes.translation: 这类特殊梦境关乎解决你物质实相中的特定问题，通常并非预知梦。若你感知到它们，可能看似预知，因为其中许多事件日后确实会实际发生。但它们并非预知，因为很大程度上正是这些梦境促成或引发了物质事件。

quotes.text: To some other types of consciousness, your physical reality is clearly understood in its symbolic form. Objects, as symbols, help construct the very framework of your existence. They, the objects, can then be manipulated quite freely.
quotes.translation: 对某些其他类型的意识而言，你的物质实相在其象征形式中清晰可辨。物体作为象征，协助构建你存在的整个架构。这些物体随后可被相当自由地操控。

quotes.text: Its sense of identity spontaneously goes beyond the change of its own form. It has no ego to cut the "I" identification short. Creatures without the compartment of the ego can easily follow their own identities beyond any changes of form. The inner self is aware of this integrity of identity, but the ego focused so securely in physical reality cannot afford this luxury.
quotes.translation: 其身份认同感自发超越自身形态的变化。它没有自我来截断"我"的认同。没有自我隔间的生灵能轻易追随自身身份超越任何形态变化。内在自我知晓这种身份的完整性，但如此稳固聚焦于物质实相的自我却无法承受这份奢侈。

source_raw.title: (First I thought of Seth's assertion in the 92nd session for September 28, 1964, that "trees have their dreams"; [in Volume 1, see the quotations in Note 1 for Session 698]. Then I remembered that he'd come through with extensive material on tree consciousness in a much earlier session. With Jane's help the next day I found that information in the 18th session, which had been held on January 22, 1964. Most of that session is unpublished, although someday we'd like to print it in full. It contains many intriguing ideas -- as, for example: "A tree knows a human being also ... [yet it] does not even build up an image of a man, which is why this is so difficult to explain ... And the same tree will recognize the same man who passes it by each day."

quotes.text: You can direct the healing of your body, telling yourself that this will be accomplished by you at one of the other levels of sleep consciousness, and you may ask for the aid of a Speaker to give you any necessary psychological guidance that is needed to maintain health. If you have particular conscious goals and if you are reasonably certain that they are beneficial ones, then you can suggest dreams in which they occur, for the dreams themselves will hasten their physical reality.
quotes.translation: 你可以引导身体的疗愈，告诉自己这将在睡眠意识的某个其他层面由你完成，并可请求一位讲者的协助，提供维持健康所需的必要心理指引。若你有特定意识目标且合理确信其有益，则可建议相关梦境出现，因为这些梦境本身将加速其物质实相化。

quotes.text: It has its own possibilities of development and achievement. This should not be forgotten, and all potential egos have, also, their own possibilities. The inner self or identity must express itself through its ego in order to manipulate within physical reality. The inner self is composed of all the potential egos that compose it, but it is more than the sum of these.
quotes.translation: 它拥有自身发展的可能性与成就。这点不应被遗忘，所有潜在自我也拥有其自身可能性。内在自我或身份必须通过其自我来表达，以便在物质实相中运作。内在自我由构成它的所有潜在自我组成，但它大于这些自我的总和。

quotes.text: You are being allowed freedom within limits. (Long pause.) The human race is a stage through which various forms of consciousness travel. The ideals keep the race pointed in beneficial directions. Thoughts and emotions form the basis. You learn by seeing these turn into physical reality. You may be killed by what you have created. If so the lesson is doubly learned.
quotes.translation: 你们被允许在限制内拥有自由。（长停顿。）人类是一个舞台，各种形式的意识在此穿行。理想使种族朝向有益的方向。思想和情感构成基础。你们通过观察这些转化为物质实相来学习。你们可能被自己所创造之物毁灭。若是如此，教训便加倍深刻。

quotes.text: As it grows, in your terms, it looks outward for confirmation of this inner knowledge. The inner self upholds the ego with its support. It forms its truths into physically oriented data with which the ego can deal. It then projects these outward into the area of physical reality. Seeing these truths thus materialized, the ego then finds it easier to accept them.
quotes.translation: 随着它成长，用你们的话说，它向外寻求这种内在知识的确认。内在自体以其支持来支撑自我。它将自身真理塑造成自我能够处理的物质导向数据。然后它将这些投射到物质实相的领域。看到这些真理如此物质化后，自我便更容易接受它们。

quotes.text: The exterior dimensions are replicas of interior personal ones. The accomplishments, wars, difficulties and institutions are all "after the event" -- that is, they are outward actions of an inward existence. Under certain conditions water turns into ice. In the same way, interior events can appear in physical reality in a quite different form than the original.
quotes.translation: 外在维度是内在个人维度的复制品。成就、战争、困境和制度都是"事后"的——也就是说，它们是内在存在的外在行动。在特定条件下，水会变成冰。同样地，内在事件可以以与原始形式截然不同的形态出现在物质实相中。

quotes.text: Now: The rules within physical reality say that objects appear to be stationary and permanent. The rules of other realities are often far different, however. The nature of mental activities will follow different lines, and "continuity" in terms of time will not exist. Perceptual organization will exist by the use of different psychological groupings. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 现在：物质实相内的规则说物体看似静止且恒久。然而其他实相的规则往往大不相同。心智活动的本质会遵循不同的路线，"连续性"在时间意义上将不复存在。知觉组织将通过使用不同的心理分组而存在。（停顿。）

quotes.text: This is the experiment that has not been tried, and these are the truths that you must learn after physical death. Some, after death, understanding these truths, choose to return to physical existence and explain them. Through the centuries this has been the way. In the system of probabilities that originates within physical reality, this is also the case.
quotes.translation: 这是尚未尝试过的实验，这些是你们必须在物质死亡后学习的真理。有些人在死后理解这些真理，选择返回物质存在并解释它们。数个世纪以来，这始终是途径。在起源于物质实相的概率系统中，情况也是如此。

quotes.text: There is no single-line development, in other words. The fragment elements directed outward by you as a species also add of course to your physical reality, for without the fine balance maintained, and without this cooperation, your particular kind of environment would not be possible.
quotes.translation: 换言之，不存在单线发展。你们作为物种向外投射的片段元素当然也增添了你们的物质实相，因为若没有维持的精细平衡，若没有这种合作，你们这种特定的环境便不可能存在。

quotes.text: It is almost impossible to speak of when the personality enters the physical body without discussing the ways in which it leaves it, for all this is highly dependent upon personal characteristics and attitudes toward physical reality. Decisions as to future lives may be made not only in between-life conditions but also in dream states in any given life.
quotes.translation: 若不讨论人格离开肉体的方式，几乎无法谈论人格何时进入肉体，因为这一切高度取决于个人特质及对物质实相的态度。关于未来转世的决定不仅可在中阴状态中做出，也可在任一生命中的梦境状态里做出。

As you focus upon certain details from a larger field of physical reality, so then you focus upon only the small portion of yourself that you consider "real."
quotes.translation: "未知"实相的大部分内容涉及打破那些长期被接受的理论——这些理论阻碍你感知自我那些缺席部分所具有的强大本质。正如你从物质实相的更大场域中聚焦某些细节，你也只聚焦于你视为"真实"的那一小部分自我。

quotes.text: In the first stage, Ruburt projected through physical reality and saw personalities who had very recently died in physical terms. Now, it is very difficult to tell you simply what happens at physical death, for the conditions vary considerably, according to the individual; his abilities and beliefs will largely determine what happens in those terms.
quotes.translation: 在第一阶段，鲁柏穿越物质实相，看到了在物质层面刚去世不久的人格。现在，很难简单告诉你物质死亡时究竟发生什么，因为状况因人而异，差异极大；他的能力与信念将大体决定那些层面的遭遇。

quotes.text: As leaves drop from the tree, so finally do dream images depart from close connection with the personality. Yet a psychic connection is always maintained to some degree. Dream images are often images which cannot be created for various reasons within physical reality at any particular time. Dream images may appear later however as physical images.
quotes.translation: 正如树叶从树上飘落，梦境意象最终也会脱离与人格的紧密联结。然而某种程度的灵性联系始终维持着。梦境意象往往是因各种原因无法在特定时刻于物质实相中创造的形象。不过这些梦境意象日后可能以物质形象显现。

quotes.text: I am in somewhat the same position when I try to explain to you the nature of this inner self, for while you can become aware of it in dreams, you cannot truly appreciate its maturity or abilities; yet they are yours in the same way that the man's abilities belonged to the child. In the dream state you learn, among other things, how to construct your own physical reality day by day, just as after death you learn how to construct your next physical lifetime.
quotes.translation: 当我试图向你解释这个内在自性的本质时，我也处于类似的境地，因为虽然你可以在梦中觉察到它，却无法真正体会它的成熟度或能力；然而它们属于你，就像那个男人的能力属于那个孩子一样。在梦境状态中，你学习如何日复一日地构建自己的物质实相，就像死后你学习如何构建下一个物质人生一样。

quotes.text: He has managed to organize physical reality because he focuses so intensely within it. His knowledge of other realities is limited however to infrequent glimpses. He perceives bits and pieces of other realities. As long as his perception in this manner is so disorganized and so fragmentary he cannot hope to compose any conception of the total.
quotes.translation: 他之所以能够组织物质实相，是因为他如此强烈地聚焦于其中。然而他对其他实相的知识仅限于偶尔的瞥见。他感知到其他实相的片段。只要他以这种方式感知是如此混乱且支离破碎，他就无法期望形成任何整体的概念。

quotes.text: It is easy for you to see that seeds bring forth the fruit of the earth, each [of] their own kind. No seed is identical to any other, yet generally speaking there are species that serve to unite them. You do not mistake an orange for a grape. In the same way ideas or thoughts form general patterns, bringing forth in your world certain kinds of events. In this respect your thoughts and feelings "seed" physical reality, bringing forth materializations.
quotes.translation: 你很容易看到种子结出地上的果实，每种各从其类。没有两颗种子是完全相同的，但大致而言，有物种将它们统一起来。你不会把橙子误认为葡萄。同样地，思想或情感形成一般模式，在你的世界中带来特定种类的事件。在这方面，你的思想和情感"播种"物质实相，带来物质化。

A portrait must contain a journey into personality, and the technique and the form will then follow naturally and spontaneously.
quotes.translation: 一幅肖像必须包含对人类处境的探索和深刻陈述，一种对另一个人的奥秘的探求，无论这个人存在于你的心智中、物质实相中，还是两者兼有。一幅肖像必须包含一次进入人格的旅程，而技巧和形式将自然而然地随之而来。

quotes.text: For sometime he literally perceives many levels of reality at once, and part of what seems to be disorientation is simply the result of early confusion with so much data. According to the situation and the individual, the fetus may still be receiving messages from those he has known in the past. This adds to the confusion, and it is a matter of physical survival that he largely ignores these messages while he learns to focus in physical reality.
quotes.translation: 有一段时间，他确实同时感知到许多层次的实相，而部分看似迷失方向的现象，只是早期面对如此大量数据时的混乱结果。根据情况和个体不同，胎儿可能仍在接收来自过去认识之人的信息。这增加了混乱，而在他学习聚焦于物质实相的过程中，为了物质生存，他必须大致忽略这些信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Perhaps it is better to say that physical reality is one form that reality takes. In your system, however, you are focused much more intensely upon one relatively small aspect of experience.
quotes.translation: 或许更好的说法是，物质实相是实相所采取的一种形式。然而，在你的系统中，你更为强烈地聚焦于经验中相对微小的一方面。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: While your feeling-tone is uniquely yours, still it is expressed in a certain fashion that is shared by all consciousnesses focused in physical reality. So in those terms you spring from the earth as all the other creatures and natural living structures. You are, while physical, a portion of nature, therefore, not apart from it.
quotes.translation: 虽然你的感受基调是独一无二的，但它仍以某种所有聚焦于物质实相的意识所共有的方式表达。因此就这些层面而言，你与所有其他生物及自然生命结构一样，皆源自大地。当你处于物质形态时，你是自然的一部分，而非与之分离。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: "Units of consciousness do help form different kinds of physical realities--as indeed Ruburt has himself hinted in some of his poetry. There are many dimensions that are as physical, so to speak, as your own world, but if you are not focused in them you would not at all be aware of their existence, but perceive only empty space.
quotes.translation: "意识单位确实协助形成不同种类的物质实相——正如鲁柏本人在某些诗作中暗示的那样。可以这么说，有许多维度与你们的世界一样具有物质性，但若你未聚焦其中，便完全无法察觉其存在，只能感知到空无的空间。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The paintings already exist however as definite potential forms, already created by your whole self. Only you can give them physical reality however. You can only fail in not giving them physical form, and you can only fail to give them physical form by refusing to open up your inner channels to the intuitions of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 然而，这些画作早已作为明确的潜在形式存在，由你的整体自己创造。但唯有你才能赋予它们物质实相。你唯一可能失败之处，在于未能赋予它们物质形态；而未能赋予物质形态的唯一原因，是你拒绝向整体自己的直觉敞开内在通道。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (Rewritten November/2000: The vision grew out of Seth's saying in the deleted 382nd session, on November 27/67, that I'd do well known painting of Bill Gallagher. It will be based upon the conception of my painting of 1954 that I "sold to Sonja. ''see session 584 in Seth Speaks, held on May 3/71.)

quotes.text: The durability is achieved because of constant expansion in terms of value fulfillment. Your camouflage physical universe does, necessarily, lead you to suppose that time exists in terms of past, present and future, simply because the idea or energy constructed into physical reality therefore operates under physical properties.
quotes.translation: 这种持久性是通过价值完成层面的持续扩展而达成的。你们伪装性的物质宇宙必然导致你认为时间以过去、现在、未来的形式存在，仅仅因为被构建成物质实相的理念或能量因此需遵循物质属性运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You do have access to the inner self, therefore. You are hardly cut off from your own soul or entity. The ego prefers to consider itself the captain at the helm, so to speak, since it is the ego who most directly deals with the sometimes tumultuous seas of physical reality, and it does not want to be distracted from this task.
quotes.translation: 因此你确实能触及内在自己。你绝非与自己的灵魂或存有隔绝。可以这么说，自我更愿自视为掌舵的船长，因为正是自我最直接处理物质实相那时而汹涌的海域，它不愿被这项任务分心。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: These sessions represent what you might call previews of eternity, in that you are to some extent receptors of thought that is not hampered by time, and of a companionship that has not ceased with the stirring of the centuries, and with a valid emotional relationship that has escaped the camouflage aspect of physical reality.
quotes.translation: 这些课代表着你可称之为永恒预演的东西，因为你在某种程度上是未受时间阻碍的思想的接收者，是未曾因世纪流转而终止的陪伴的接收者，并且拥有已超越物质实相伪装层面的有效情感关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The ego does want to understand and interpret physical reality, and to relate to it. It wants to help you survive within physical existence, but by putting blinders upon it, you hamper its perception and native flexibility. Then because it is inflexible you say that this is the natural function and characteristic of the ego.
quotes.translation: 自我确实想要理解和诠释物质实相，并与之建立关联。它想要帮助你在物质存在中生存，但若给它戴上眼罩，反而会阻碍它的感知与天生的灵活性。当它变得僵化时，你便说这是自我的自然功能与特性。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Again past, present and future are definite realities only to the ego. Memory to the ego presupposes the existence of a past that no longer exists within physical reality. When I say that the dreaming self has memory, therefore, of its dream experiences, I mean that it scans its present existence. It is a simultaneous self.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，过去、现在与未来对自我而言才是明确的实相。对自我而言，记忆预设了一个在物质实相中已不存在的过去。因此，当我说做梦的自我拥有其梦境体验的记忆时，我是指它扫描着自身的当下存在。它是一个同时性的自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: As you know therefore we have differentiated between an outer ego, who manipulates within physical reality, and an inner ego who directs the activities of the inner self. Now then, the next step should indeed be clear. In the main, the ego deals with secondary realities, and in the main, the inner ego deals with primaries.
quotes.translation: 因此，如你所知，我们区分了在物质实相中运作的外在自我，与指挥内在活动的内在自我。那么，下一步应该很清楚了。大体而言，自我处理的是次要实相，而内在自我处理的是主要实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You may begin to perceive all physical data through the eyes of that core belief alone. You will not look out upon physical reality with the wonder of a child any more, or with the unstructured curiosity of an individual, but always through parental eyes. Thus you will close yourself off from much of physical experience.
quotes.translation: 你可能会开始仅透过那个核心信念的眼睛来感知所有物质资料。你将不再以孩童的惊奇眼光，或个体未经结构化的好奇心来看待物质实相，而总是透过父母的眼睛。如此你便将自己与许多物质经验隔绝开来。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: But self A is not limited to the egos perceptions only, therefore it may be said that self As perceptions are not limited, in toto, to the field in which it exists. For it is not so limited in dreams and in other states, yet while consciousness is in these other conditions, self A still exists within physical reality.
quotes.translation: 但自我A并不局限于自我的感知，因此可以说，自我A的感知整体上并不受限于它存在的场域。因为在梦境及其他状态中它并不受此限制，然而当意识处于这些其他状态时，自我A仍存在于物质实相中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: There are unities, barely contemplated, then, between language, exterior communication, the physical nervous system, and time, or your idea of it. These merge so beautifully that they all serve to form a seemingly perfect picture of physical reality. The camouflage would not be effective were it less perfect. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 因此，在语言、外在沟通、物质神经系统与时间（或你对时间的观念）之间，存在着几乎未被深思的统一性。它们如此美妙地融合，共同构成了一幅看似完美的物质实相画面。若这伪装不够完美，便无法生效。（停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: If such experiences appear less real than more obviously material realities, they also have at times a peculiar vividness that cannot be overlooked. Their nature is simply different from the nature of physical realities. If they seem occasionally insubstantial, it is because their substance is of a different quality.
quotes.translation: 若此类体验看似不如更明显的物质实相真实，它们有时却具有不容忽视的独特鲜明性。其本质与物质实相的本质截然不同。若它们偶尔显得虚无缥缈，那是因为其构成质地属于另一种品质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Because suggestions are formed of the same stuff that forms your physical reality, suggestions can indeed change the framework within which you operate. This is no Pollyanna hogwash. Many of the ways and the means have been given. My suggestions, if followed, will be fair enough proof of the validity of our material.
quotes.translation: 由于暗示由构成你物质实相的同一材质形成，暗示确实能改变你运作的框架。这绝非盲目乐观的胡扯。许多方法与途径已经给出。若遵循我的建议，将足以证明我们材料的有效性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （Tracing of the photographic negative used in the 7th envelope test, in Session 187, September 13,1965.）

quotes.text: Now this is a split of the conscious mind. It does not originate within the inner self. When Augustus Two takes over he is quite conscious. He simply views physical reality through an undeviating system of beliefs. The messages sent to the body are not in the least contradictory. The body is under excellent control.
quotes.translation: 这是意识心的一种分裂，并非源自内在自己。当奥古斯都二号接管时，他完全清醒。他只是通过一套坚定不移的信念系统来审视物质实相。传递给身体的讯息毫无矛盾之处，身体处于极佳的控制之下。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You wanted something that your work provides, but in a different fashion. Do not mistake me here. This is a general statement, subject to some specific alterations. However, generally speaking, those completely focused in physical reality will look for their prime fulfillment within it. They will also have children.
quotes.translation: 你渴望某种你的工作能提供的东西，但要以不同方式获得。此处请勿误解我。这是通则性陈述，需视具体情况调整。然而一般而言，完全聚焦于物质实相者会在此中寻求首要满足，他们也会生儿育女。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You can learn to change your physical environment, therefore, by learning to change and manipulate your dream environment. You can also suggest specific dreams in which a desired change is seen, and under certain conditions these will then appear in your physical reality. Now often you do this without realizing it.
quotes.translation: 因此，你可以通过学习改变和操控你的梦境环境，来学习改变你的物质环境。你还可以暗示特定梦境，在其中看见渴望的改变，在特定条件下这些改变将显现在你的物质实相中。其实你常在不自觉中这么做。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Problems leading to world wars also cause worldwide natural disasters. These are merely another materialization of energy projected by those who have not learned how to handle it. Such reactions fire through the dream universe also, and are reflected through all phases of your activity. The whole self compares the performance of various portions of itself in physical reality and in dream reality, and draws its own conclusions.
quotes.translation: 导致世界大战的问题同样引发全球性自然灾害。这不过是那些尚未学会处理能量者所投射能量的另一种物质化。此类反应也会贯穿梦境宇宙，并反映在你活动的所有层面。整个自己会比较自身在物质实相与梦境实相中各部分的表现，并得出自己的结论。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Studies of space and distance as they are experienced in dreams will be helpful, and our material will indeed deal with such discussions. For investigation into the nature of space and time as they are experienced within the dream framework, will tell you more about the real nature of space and time then you can ever learn through studying their distorted appearances within physical reality. This will be most important to us.
quotes.translation: 对梦境中体验到的空间与距离的研究将大有裨益，我们的资料确实会涉及这类讨论。因为探究梦境架构中体验到的空间与时间本质，会比通过研究它们在物质实相中的扭曲表象，更能让你了解空间与时间的真实本质。这对我们而言至关重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The beliefs whose energy generated this "alternate self image" then appeared in the daylight, acting out their natural results in physical reality. Augustus One, now in manhood, was forced to perceive the nature of these beliefs to some extent, yet when he was here visiting Ruburt he still would not examine them.
quotes.translation: 那些信念的能量生成了这个"替代自我形象"，随后在日光下显现，在物质实相中展现其自然结果。已至壮年的奥古斯都一号被迫在一定程度上看清这些信念的本质，然而当他来拜访鲁柏时，仍不愿审视它们。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: New paragraph. (Very quietly): Once you understand the symbolic nature of physical reality, then you will no longer feel entrapped by it. You have formed the symbols, and therefore you can change them. You must learn, of course, what the various symbols mean in your own life, and how to translate their meaning.
quotes.translation: 新段落。（非常轻声地）：一旦你理解物质实相的象征本质，就不会再感到被其束缚。你创造了这些象征，因此也能改变它们。当然，你必须学会解读各种象征在你生命中的含义，以及如何转化它们的意义。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The thoughts may rather faithfully, though never completely, translate such data, or they may considerably distort it. Behind thoughts are images, which are more basic but still physically oriented. Because they are more basic, they have a stronger effect. They are more Emotionally charged, more concise than thoughts, and they are directly connected with the mechanics involved in translating inner data to physical reality.
quotes.translation: 思想可能相当忠实地（尽管永远无法完全）转化这些数据，也可能严重扭曲它们。思想背后是意象，这些意象更基础但仍偏向物质导向。正因为更基础，它们具有更强的影响力。它们比思想承载更多情感能量、更凝练，且直接关联着将内在数据转化为物质实相的运作机制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: In the time framework within which you now exist I can help you, but you cannot help me except by allowing me to help you, you see. In the gestalt which could develop we would be in a position of helping each other more equally. Now through you I affect physical reality, and this is indeed one of my purposes.
quotes.translation: 在你当前存在的时间架构内，我能帮助你，但你无法帮助我——除非通过允许我帮助你，你明白吗。在可能发展的完形中，我们将能更平等地相互帮助。此刻我通过你影响物质实相，这确实是我的目的之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: If I were to make the same statement for example to any of my readers, I would be accused of saying that physical reality was composed of the discards of the universe.
quotes.translation: 举例而言，若我对任何读者说出同样的话，就会被指责说物质实相是由宇宙的废弃物构成的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It goes without saying that as you create physical reality you also form the other planes of existence in which you operate. You do operate simultaneously within all levels of reality and if you become familiar with various coordinates, the self that you know could become aware of your own other existences.
quotes.translation: 不言而喻，当你创造物质实相时，你也同时形成了你运作其中的其他存在层面。你确实在所有实相层面中同时运作，如果你熟悉各种坐标，你所认知的自我就能意识到你其他的存在形式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Many people are unable to endow fragments with such physical reality, and thus shove them more or less harmlessly away at arm's length. It is as if in Ruburt's great experience the other night that the dissociated part of the personality donned another identity and battled with Ruburt's own for dominance.
quotes.translation: 许多人无法赋予碎片如此具体的物质实相，于是或多或少无害地将它们推开一臂之遥。就像鲁柏那晚的重大体验中，人格中分离的部分披上了另一个身份，与鲁柏自身争夺主导权。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There is no other valid way of changing physical events. It might help if you imagine an inner living dimension within yourself in which you create, in miniature psychic form, all the exterior conditions that you know. Simply put, you do exactly this. Your thoughts, feelings and mental pictures can be called incipient exterior events, for in one way or another each of these is materialized into physical reality.
quotes.translation: 改变物质事件没有其他有效的方法。如果你想象自己内在有一个活生生的维度，在其中以微型心灵形式创造你所知的所有外在条件，这会有所帮助。简单来说，你确实在这样做。你的思想、情感和心灵画面可被称为初生的外在事件，因为每一种都会以某种方式被物质化为物质实相。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I said probabilities were realized (in the 653rd session in Chapter Fourteen) ... and she is suddenly open to her (imagined) events as actualities. Because you are space-time oriented, her realizations, accepted momentarily as physical reality, cause gaps in what you think of as normal experience.
quotes.translation: 我曾说过可能性被实现了（第十四章第653节）……她突然向她的（想象）事件敞开，视其为实相。因为你们以时空为导向，她暂时接受为物质实相的那些认知，会在你们视为正常经验的领域中造成间隙。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This is a slight aside. Many people dreamed of Jack Kennedy's death in advance, as you know. On one level this knowledge was available to the man himself. This does not mean that the death have to happen. It was a vivid possibility. It was also one of many solutions to several problems. While it was not the most suitable solution, it was the closest man could come at that particular time in physical reality.
quotes.translation: 这是题外话。如你所知，许多人提前梦到过杰克·肯尼迪之死。在某个层面上，这个人自己也能获得这种知识。这并不意味着死亡必然发生。它是一个鲜明的可能性。它也是解决若干问题的众多方案之一。虽然它并非最合适的方案，但在那个特定时刻，它是人类在物质实相中能接近的最佳选择。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Obviously, physical reality only happens to be the portion of reality you recognize. The paintings that you will paint exist now. It is possible for you to project yourself into one of your own future landscapes. This would not be an imaginative projection. This is what I am trying to tell you.
quotes.translation: 显然，物质实相只是你所认知的实相的一部分。你将要创作的画作此刻已然存在。你有可能将自己投射到未来的某幅风景画中。这并非想象力的投射。这正是我想要告诉你的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: [However, as] you begin to question the nature of time itself, then the "when" of the universe is beside the point. The motion and energy of the universe still comes from within. I certainly realize that this is hardly a scientific statement -- yet the moment that All That Is conceived of a physical system it was invisibly created, endowed with creativity, and bound to emerge [into physical reality].
quotes.translation: 然而，当你开始质疑时间本身的本质时，宇宙的"何时"就变得无关紧要了。宇宙的运动和能量仍然来自内在。我当然明白这很难称得上科学陈述——但就在一切万有构想出一个物理系统的那一刻，它便无形中被创造出来，被赋予创造力，并注定要显现为物质实相。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... Your sense perception, physically speaking, is a result of behavior on the part of organs that seem to you to have no reality outside of their relationship with you. Those organs are themselves composed of atoms and molecules with their own consciousnesses. They have, then, their own states of sensation and cognition. They work for you, allowing you to perceive physical reality.
quotes.translation: 请稍等片刻……从物理角度来说，你的感官知觉是你那些器官行为的结果，而这些器官在你看来似乎除了与你的关系之外别无实相。这些器官本身由具有自身意识的原子和分子构成。它们拥有自己的感知与认知状态。它们为你工作，使你得以感知物质实相。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is far from a closed system in any way. Not only does it feed the physical universe, but in it many aspects of your own dreams become actual. Do you dream of an apple? Do you dream of a child, who has no existence in physical reality? Often these exist in the field of probability.
quotes.translation: 它绝非任何意义上的封闭系统。它不仅滋养着物质宇宙，而且你许多梦境的面向在其中化为现实。你梦见一个苹果吗？你梦见一个在物质实相中并不存在的孩子吗？这些往往存在于可能性场域中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: When you have done this often enough so that you are intimately aware of the contrast, you will have a subjective feeling, a point of knowing within yourself, that will clearly indicate to you how your consciousness feels when it is at its finest point of focus in physical reality.
quotes.translation: 当你足够频繁地进行这种对比，以至于对差异了如指掌时，你内心会产生一种主观感受、一种知晓点，它会清晰地向你表明：当你的意识聚焦于物质实相最精微之处时，它感觉如何。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Each particular "station" of consciousness perceives in a different kind of reality, and as mentioned earlier (in Session 711, for instance), you usually tune in to your home station most of the time. If you turn your focus only slightly away, the world appears differently; and if that slightly altered focus were the predominant one, then that is how the world would seem to be. Each aspect of the psyche perceives the reality upon which it is focused, and that reality is also the materialization of a particular state of the psyche projected outward. You can learn to encounter other realities by altering your position within your own psyche.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Now. There are indeed portions of dream reality that you yourself may not have constructed, but that are constructed by others. You recall that in physical reality you can only perceive your own constructions, as a rule. Now, my clear friends, this does not apply to dream reality.
quotes.translation: 现在。梦境实相中确实存在某些部分并非由你自身构建，而是由他人构建的。你记得在物质实相中，通常你只能感知自己的构建物。现在，我亲爱的朋友们，这并不适用于梦境实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Having determined upon physical reality as a dimension in which it will project itself, the inner self therefore first of all takes care to form and maintain the physical basis upon which all else must depend--those Physical properties of earth that can be called natural ones.
quotes.translation: 内在自我既已决定将物质实相作为其投射自身的维度，便会首先着力形成并维持一切事物赖以存在的物理基础——那些可被称为自然属性的地球物理特性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This man will not be a stranger, yet he will not be the old Bernard, and Sarah can only help him by letting him know that she is there, and waiting. This is more important than it may appear, for the new ego will need guides to manipulate within physical reality once again.
quotes.translation: 这个人不会是个陌生人，但他也不会是过去的伯纳德，莎拉只能通过让他知道她在这里、在等待来帮助他。这比表面看起来更重要，因为新的自我需要向导，才能再次在物质实相中运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Your ego, in common ordinary terms, has changed as a result of our sessions, in that it is now concerned with other realities also. In common senseterms, the ego handles manipulations within physical reality, and focuses brilliantly within a rather narrow range.
quotes.translation: 你的自我，用普通话说，因我们的课程而改变，因为它现在也关注其他实相。用常识来说，自我处理物质实相中的操作，并在相当狭窄的范围内聚焦得极为清晰。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Let us make a clear distinction here: Your conscious beliefs direct the flow of unconscious processes which bring your ideas into physical reality, so while your thoughts cause your experience, you are not consciously aware of how this takes place (forcefully).
quotes.translation: 让我们在此明确区分：你有意识的信念引导着无意识过程的流向，这些过程将你的想法带入物质实相，所以，虽然你的思想导致你的体验，但你并未有意识地知道这是如何发生的（强调地）。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now: Others, finished with reincarnations and of a different overall nature, may begin the long journey leading toward the vocation of a creator. On a much different plane, this can be compared to geniuses in creative fields within your own physical reality.
quotes.translation: 现在：其他已完成转世、具有不同整体本质的存在，可能开始通往创造者天职的漫长旅程。在一个非常不同的层面上，这可以比作你们物质实相中创意领域的天才。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The field of probable events exists as a reality. From it the self chooses those actions which shall become a part of physical reality. Here indeed free will enters into the matter. This is a pun. I would be disappointed if it were missed. It is a good one.
quotes.translation: 可能事件的场域作为一个实相存在。自我从中选择那些将成为物质实相一部分的行动。自由意志确实在此介入此事。这是个双关语。如果被错过，我会失望的。这是个好双关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Yet within the dream state the familiar physical props sometimes disappear. The inner I operates very well without them. In order to manipulate a physical reality however, the inner I needs a self that is acclimated to physical conditions; hence the ego.
quotes.translation: 然而在梦境状态中，熟悉的物质道具有时会消失。内在自我没有它们也能运作得很好。但为了在物质实相中操作，内在自我需要一个适应物质条件的自我；因此就有了自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You do not know the self as it is within physical existence, and until you do you cannot hope to know what survives physical death, or what part of you is awake while the ego sleeps. When I refer to the ego I do so for simplicity's sake, since the term has meaning to you. There are obviously portions of the self that never operate directly within physical reality.
quotes.translation: 你并不了解在物质存在中的那个自己，除非你了解它，否则你无法期望知道什么在物质死亡后幸存，或在自我沉睡时你的哪一部分是清醒的。当我提到自我时，是为了简化起见，因为这个词对你有意义。显然，自我的某些部分从未直接在物质现实中运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: When the lessons are learned there is no need for physical reality. The survival instinct, strongly connected with the physical self, keeps it anchored in focus within your system. Without it consciousness would tend to float free. It is your anchor.
quotes.translation: 当功课学完后，便不再需要物质现实。与物质自我紧密相连的生存本能，使其锚定在你的系统焦点中。没有它，意识往往会自由漂浮。它是你的锚。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The cell's comprehension leaps its present form. The reality, the physical reality of a given cell, is the focused result of its existence before and after itself in time; and from its knowledge of past and future it receives its present structure.
quotes.translation: 细胞的理解超越了其当前形态。一个特定细胞的现实，即其物质现实，是它在时间中前后存在的聚焦结果；从它对过去和未来的知识中，它获得了当前的结构。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json
