quotes.text: This is not the result of any inherent egotistical quality. It is true that the egos responsibility is with the relationship between the self and the physical environment. It must of necessity be focused within the confines of physical reality.
quotes.translation: 这并非任何固有自我特质的产物。诚然，自我的责任在于自我与物质环境之间的关系。它必然必须聚焦在物质现实的界限内。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The episode did involve projection, mainly through intensities. These intensities you interpret as time and space. Now in a different kind of projection, you could face for example the girl's thought forms as a pseudo physical reality.
quotes.translation: 那个事件确实涉及投射，主要通过强度。这些强度你解释为时间和空间。现在，在另一种投射中，你可能会面对例如女孩的思想形态，作为一种伪物质现实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: This portion is conscious, aware, alert. It is you, so focused in physical reality, who do not listen to its voice, who do not understand that it is the great psychological strength from which your physically oriented self springs.
quotes.translation: 这个部分是清醒的、有意识的、警觉的。是你，如此聚焦在物质现实中，没有倾听它的声音，没有理解它是你物质导向自我所源自的伟大心理力量。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Physical reality is dependent upon your sensual perception of action, and that is all.
quotes.translation: 物质实相完全依赖你对行动的感官感知，仅此而已。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: In a considerable number of ghost or apparition cases this is what is involved. Here the Emotional energy is at such a pitch that the individual appears out of context within your physical reality, but has no freedom within it.
quotes.translation: 在相当多的鬼魂或幻影案例中，这正是所涉及的情况。此时情感能量达到如此强烈的程度，以至于个体在你们的物质实相中显得不合时宜，但在其中毫无自由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: In this existence you are physically oriented. Surely then the conscious physically oriented mind is the one that is meant to make deductions about the nature of physical reality. Otherwise you would have no free will.
quotes.translation: 在此存在中，你们以物质为导向。那么，有意识的、以物质为导向的心智，当然应该是那个被用来推断物质实相本质的。否则你们将没有自由意志。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It becomes more and more a portion of the supraconsciousness. Its new function is to help direct the overall personality so that inner abilities and illuminations can also reach physical reality.
quotes.translation: 它越来越成为超意识的一部分。它的新功能是帮助引导整体人格，使内在的能力与启示也能触及物质实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: When you are considering dream reality, it is easier for you to understand that you construct the reality therein. You find it more difficult to understand the same thing about physical reality.
quotes.translation: 当你们考虑梦境实相时，更容易理解你们在其中构建了实相。但你们发现，对物质实相理解同样的事情则更加困难。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: In the waking state the whole self is focused toward physical reality. In the dreaming state the whole self is focused within a different dimension. It is every bit as conscious and aware.
quotes.translation: 在清醒状态中，整个自我聚焦于物质实相。在梦境状态中，整个自我聚焦于另一个维度。它同样具有意识和觉知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: You will be able to perceive physical reality because you want to, knowing it to be one of many realities. You will not be forced to perceive it alone, out of ignorance.
quotes.translation: 你将能够感知物质实相，因为你想要如此，并知晓它只是众多实相之一。你不会因无知而被迫只感知这一种实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is true that the whole personality, or whole self, does not directly manifest itself within physical reality.
quotes.translation: 的确，整个的人格或整个的自我，并不直接在物质实相中显化自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now: Because you are conscious of being, you form your physical reality through conscious thought.
quotes.translation: 现在：因为你意识到自身的存在，你通过有意识的念头形成了你的物质实相。
